name: 500 Toads
description: You conjure hundreds of magical toads to fill the area and hop around.

name: Acid Splash
description: You splash a glob of acid that splatters your target and nearby creatures.

name: Acidic Burst
description: You create a shell of acid around yourself that immediately bursts outward, dealing 2d6 acid damage to each creature in the area with a basic Reflex save.Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

name: Adapt Self
description: You make subtle changes to your body to adapt to the situation.

name: Admonishing Ray
description: A ray of energy bludgeons your target into submission without causing lasting harm.

name: Agile Feet
description: The blessings of your god make your feet faster and your movements more fluid.

name: Agitate
description: You send the target's mind and body into overdrive, forcing it to become restless and hyperactive.

name: Air Bubble
description: Trigger A creature within range enters an environment where it can't breathe.

name: Airburst
description: A blast of wind wildly pushes everything nearby.

name: Alarm
description: You ward an area to alert you when creatures enter without your permission.

name: All-Encompassing Hunger
description: You reach out to devour a life, regardless of whether you need it for sustenance.

name: Ancestral Memories
description: The memories of long-dead spellcasters grant you their knowledge, making your spells more formidable.

name: Ancestral Touch
description: You touch a creature and force them to see and feel the ancestors surrounding you.

name: Ancient Dust
description: You cough up a cloud of gray soil, echoing the dust in the graves of Kemnebi's many victims.

name: Angelic Halo
description: You gain an angelic halo with an aura that increases allies' healing from the spell.

name: Angelic Messenger
description: You transport yourself to either a celestial plane or a world in the Universe where worshippers of your patron can be found.

name: Animal Allies
description: You summon tiny, ordinary animals from the environment, such as insects, birds, or fish, to quickly lash out at nearby foes.

name: Animate Rope
description: You cause a length or section of or a rope-like object to animate and follow simple commands.

name: Ant Haul
description: You reinforce the target's musculoskeletal system to bear more weight.

name: Anticipate Peril
description: You grant the target brief foresight.

name: Appearance of Wealth
description: You create a brief vision of immense wealth filling the spell's area.

name: Approximate
description: Area 1 cubic foot Your magic quickly flows over an area to help you count and catalog.

name: Aqueous Blast
description: You evoke a mass of water into the air around your outstretched fist.

name: Arms of Nature
description: All wood, dead or alive, is your armory.

name: Ashen Wind
description: You conjure a swirling wind of ashes that blows through the area.

name: Athletic Rush
description: Your body fills with physical power and skill.

name: Augmented Body
source: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun
description: You magically augment your body with clockwork parts and magitech innovations.

name: Bane
description: You fill the minds of your enemies with doubt.

name: Befuddle
description: You sow seeds of confusion in your target's mind, causing its actions and thoughts to become clumsy.Critical Success The target is unaffected.

name: Benediction
description: Divine protection helps protect your companions.

name: Beseech the Sphinx
description: You look to the great Sphinx constellation, wisest of all cosmic guides and favored of Phimater, asking them to lend their insight to the target.

name: Bit of Luck
description: You tilt the scales of luck slightly to protect a creature from disaster.

name: Biting Words
description: You entwine magic with your voice, causing your taunts and jibes to physically harm your enemies.

name: Bless
description: Blessings from beyond help your companions strike true.

name: Blood Ward
description: Your patron's aegis descends to shield a target from harm.

name: Boost Eidolon
description: You focus deeply on the link between you and your eidolon and boost the power of your eidolon's attacks.

name: Brain Drain
description: You probe the target's mind to glean knowledge.

name: Bramble Bush
description: In a sudden burst of growth, you cause a thorned bush to sprout from the ground, lash around, and wither.

name: Breadcrumbs
description: You protect your target from going astray in hostile territory by tracking where it's already been, helping it deduce where it still needs to go.

name: Breathe Fire
description: A gout of flame sprays from your mouth.

name: Briny Bolt
description: You hurl a bolt of saltwater from your extended hand.

name: Buffeting Winds
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You release a quick burst of wind that batters your living opponents without causing them lasting harm, while also blowing undead away.

name: Bullhorn
description: You amplify your voice, loud enough for you to be heard easily at a great distance.

name: Buoyant Bubbles
description: You create a thin layer of foamy bubbles that adhere to the target, causing it to float in water and similar liquids.

name: Buzzing Bites
description: You evoke buzzing and crawling insects to climb onto a foe's body and bite, dealing 1d4 piercing damage and potentially sickening the foe, depending on its Fortitude save.

name: Cackle
description: With a quick burst of laughter, you prolong a magical effect you created.

name: Call of the Grave
description: You fire a ray of sickening energy.

name: Call to Arms
description: Trigger You are about to roll for initiative.

name: Camel Spit
description: You alter your stomach, esophagus, and tongue to be able to spit partially digested food with force.

name: Carryall
description: A small platform of magical force materializes adjacent to you to carry cargo.

name: Caustic Blast
description: You fling a large glob of acid that immediately detonates, spraying nearby creatures.

name: Celestial Accord
description: You intervene in a heated disagreement between two creatures, encouraging them to put aside their differences and find some common ground.

name: Charged Javelin
description: You fire a javelin of electricity that leaves a charged field around its target.

name: Charm
description: To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze.

name: Charming Push
description: You push at the target's mind to deflect their ire.

name: Charming Touch
description: You infuse your target with attraction, causing it to act friendlier toward you.

name: Chastising Retort
description: Trigger A creature within range attempts a Deception check to or .You unleash some choice words empowered with divine might.

name: Chilling Spray
description: A cone of icy shards bursts from your spread hands and coats the targets in a layer of frost.

name: Cinder Gaze
description: You've learned to read the future in the patterns of flames and smoke.

name: Cleanse Cuisine
description: You transform all food and beverages in the area into delicious fare, changing water into wine or another fine beverage, or enhancing the food's taste and ingredients to make it a gourmet treat.

name: Clinging Ice
description: Freezing sleet and heavy snowfall collect on the target's feet and legs, dealing 1d4 cold damage and other effects depending on its Reflex save.

name: Cloak of Shadow
description: You drape the target in a mantle of swirling shadows that make it harder to see.

name: Clouded Focus
description: You sharpen a creature's senses, though more distant objects become hazy, indistinct, or muted to it.

name: Command
description: You shout a command that's hard to ignore.

name: Concordant Choir
description: You unleash a dangerous consonance of reverberating sound, focusing on a single target or spreading out to damage many foes.

name: Conductive Weapon
description: You channel powerful electric current through the metal of a weapon, zapping anyone the item hits.

name: Cornucopia
description: Vines twine into a wicker horn in your hands, and out spills a single fruit, nut, or similar small bit of produce.

name: Counter Performance
description: Trigger You or an ally within 60 feet rolls a saving throw against an auditory or visual effect.

name: Courageous Anthem
description: You inspire yourself and your allies with words or tunes of encouragement.

name: Create Mycoguardian
description: You transform the target into an fungus creature with a level up to that allowed in the below table.

name: Create Water
description: As you cup your hands, water begins to flow forth from them.

name: Creative Splash
description: A deluge of paint or colorful illusions descend on the area, reflecting your personal creative specialty.

name: Crescent Scepter
description: You hold up any object, which takes on the appearance of glowing regalia in the eyes of those who look on you, representing the political or religious institute most feared by each creature.

name: Crushing Ground
description: You tear open the ground then slam it shut.

name: Cry of Destruction
description: Your voice booms, smashing what's in front of you.

name: Cutting Eye
description: Trigger You are the target of an attack or must attempt a saving throw against a spell.Your eyes open enviously, stealing the power of an opponent for yourself.

name: Cycle of Retribution
description: An understanding of how violence begets more violence fills your target, causing it mental anguish when it attempts to take violent actions.

name: Daemonic Pact
description: You call upon the powers of Abaddon to grant you the assistance of a daemon.

name: Darkened Forest Form
description: Your apparition casts a feral shadow over your form.

name: Daze
description: You push into the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt.

name: Dazzling Flash
description: You raise your religious symbol and create a blinding flash of light.

name: Death's Call
description: Trigger A living creature within 20 feet of you dies, or an undead creature within 20 feet of you is destroyed.

name: Debilitating Terror
description: You fill the target's mind with terrifying images to disrupt their combat focus.

name: Deep Breath
description: You take an incredibly deep breath and can hold it for the spell's duration.

name: Dehydrate
description: You stir the inner fire of all things within the area, driving out moisture.

name: Déjà Vu
description: You loop a thought process in the target's mind, forcing it to repeat a moment's worth of actions.

name: Delay Consequence
description: Trigger A creature or object within range is hit by an attack.You transpose the moment that the target would be injured to a point later in its timestream.

name: Demonic Pact
description: You call in a favor from one demon of level 2 or lower, two demons of level 0 or lower, or three demons of level –1 or lower.Critical Success You conjure the demon or demons.

name: Detect Alignment
description: Your eyes glow as you sense aligned auras.

name: Detect Magic
description: You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic.

name: Detect Metal
description: You attune yourself to magnetic fields, becoming aware of the presence or absence of metallic objects, veins, and deposits within the area.

name: Detect Poison
description: You detect whether a creature is venomous or poisonous, or if an object is poison or has been poisoned.

name: Devouring Dark Form
description: Your apparition's dark power blends with your physical body, allowing you to take on terrifying characteristics of creatures that lurk in dark places.

name: Diabolic Edict
description: You issue a diabolic edict, demanding the target perform a particular task and offering rewards for its fulfillment.

name: Diabolic Pact
description: You make an appeal to a powerful devil, asking them to bind some of their subordinates to your service.

name: Dim the Light
description: Trigger You cast a darkness or shadow spell.

name: Dimensional Assault
description: You tumble through space, making a short dimensional hop to better position yourself for an attack.

name: Discern Secrets
description: Your patron deigns to whisper a few secrets.

name: Discomfiting Whispers
description: You are surrounded by an aura of spiteful murmurings that incite bad luck and punish failure.

name: Disguise Magic
description: You alter how an item's or spell's magical aura appears to effects like detect magic.

name: Distortion Lens
description: You create a magical lens that distorts space as best suits you.

name: Distracting Decoy
description: You conjure a colorful, fast-moving shape, such as a small bird or other animal that draws your target's eye.

name: Div Pact
description: You call upon the powers of Abaddon to grant you the assistance of a div.

name: Divine Lance
description: You unleash a beam of divine energy.

name: Divine Plagues
description: Your deity sends wracking plagues.

name: Diviner's Sight
description: You glimpse into the target's future.

name: Dizzying Colors
description: You unleash a swirling multitude of colors that overwhelms creatures based on their Will saves.

name: Draconic Barrage
description: You shape energy into a small group of tiny dragons (or other serpentine creatures) that flit around you.

name: Draw Ire
description: You cause mental distress to a creature, goading it to strike back at you.

name: Draw Moisture
description: You draw water out of an object, possibly to clean up spills or quickly dry a soaked book or shirt.

name: Earth's Bile
description: Your apparition is the will of lava and magma made manifest, the earth's molten blood unleashing devastating bursts of liquid stone and unquenchable fire at your command.

name: Earthworks
description: With a ripple of earth, you raise small barriers from the ground.

name: Eat Fire
description: Trigger You would take fire damage.

name: Echoing Weapon
description: You channel magical energy into the target weapon, and the air around it faintly hums each time you strike a blow, as the impact is absorbed into the weapon.

name: Eject Soul
description: Your touch disrupts the connection between body and soul, possibly forcing the soul out of the body altogether.

name: Electric Arc
description: An arc of lightning leaps from one target to another.

name: Elemental Betrayal
description: Your patron uses its superior command of the elements, empowering them to undermine your foe.

name: Elemental Counter
description: Trigger You or a creature within 60 feet rolls a saving throw against a spell with the earth, fire, metal, plant, water, or wood trait, or are targeted by a spell attack with such a trait.

name: Elemental Sentinel
description: You place a tiny elemental wisp within a single object, usually a mirror, statue, or other mundane-looking item, to serve as an alarm.

name: Elemental Toss
description: With a flick of your wrist, you fling a chunk of your elemental matter at your foe.

name: Elysian Whimsy
description: You overwhelm the target with an unexpected and unpredictable desire if it fails a Will save.

name: Embodiment of Battle
description: Your apparition guides your attacks and imparts its skill to your movements.

name: Empty Inside
description: You inject a sliver of the void into your mind, momentarily remaking it into a bleak and empty place.

name: Endure
description: You invigorate the touched creature's mind and urge it to press on.

name: Enfeeble
description: You sap the target's strength, depending on its Fortitude save.

name: Entreat Spirit
description: You invite a spirit you've bonded with to bolster your mind.

name: Evil Eye
description: Your patron's resentment manifests in a baleful, envious gaze.

name: Evolution Surge
description: You flood your eidolon with power, creating a temporary evolution in your eidolon's capabilities.

name: Exchange Image
description: To mislead pursuers, the Lacunafex developed the means to swap visages.

name: Extend Boost
description: You focus on the intricacies of the magic binding you to your eidolon to extend the duration of your boost eidolon or reinforce eidolon spell.

name: Face in the Crowd
description: While in a crowd of roughly similar creatures, your appearance becomes bland and nondescript.

name: Faerie Dust
description: You sprinkle magical dust in the spell's area, making those within easier to trick.

name: Fashionista
description: The target's clothes are transformed into ostentatious attire that epitomizes high-end local fashion.

name: Fated Healing
description: You speak about the consequences of actions people take against each other and how it's possible to break cycles of violence simply by making a different choice.

name: Fear
description: You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

name: Fey Abeyance
description: Area An enclosed area up to 60 feet × 60 feet, up to 20 feet high You ward an area with cold iron bells, protecting it from the influence of the first world.

name: Figment
description: You create a simple illusory sound or vision.

name: Fire Ray
description: A blazing band of fire arcs through the air, lighting your opponent and the ground they stand upon on fire.

name: Flashy Disappearance
description: You create a puff of colorful smoke that quickly disperses while you become temporarily .

name: Fleet Step
description: You gain a +30-foot status bonus to your Speed.

name: Flense
description: With a touch, you strip off the flesh, muscle, and internal organs off your target, leaving only bare bones.

name: Flourishing Flora
description: Plants rapidly grow up from the ground.

name: Flurry of Claws
description: Vicious dragon claws appear and slash at two nearby foes.

name: Fold Metal
description: You bend the target object into a smooth metallic ball no larger than an egg.

name: Foraging Friends
description: Giving a cheerful whistle, you call forth a handful of small animals, such as birds or mice, to collect food for you and your allies.

name: Forbidden Thought
description: You place a psychic lock in a foe's mind that prevents it from a specific action.

name: Forbidding Ward
description: You ward an ally against the attacks and hostile spells from the target enemy.

name: Force Barrage
description: You fire a shard of solidified magic toward a creature that you can see.

name: Force Bolt
description: You fire an arrow-shaped bolt of force, one of the most common and reliable forms of battle magic.

name: Force Fang
description: You briefly turn your attack into pure force to bypass your opponent's defenses.

name: Forced Mercy
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You soften the target's blows, ensuring they avoid vital areas and cause no lasting harm.

name: Forced Quiet
description: You quiet the target's voice, preventing it from giving away valuable secrets.

name: Forge
description: Developed before the introduction of the Iron Lagoon, this cantrip for superheating metal has also found valuable combat use.

name: Fortify Summoning
description: As you call a creature to your side, your magic transforms its body, heightening its ferocity and fortifying its resilience.

name: Frenzied Revelry
description: You recall memories of hedonistic rites to send yourself into an infectious frenzy, dancing and howling wildly to encourage your companions to join in.

name: Friendfetch
description: You shoot out ephemeral, telekinetic strands that drag each target directly toward you, stopping in the closest unoccupied space to you in this path.

name: Frost's Touch
description: Your gelid shard drinks down nearby heat in a futile attempt to sate itself and achieve a level of frigid cold unheard of on the Material Plane.

name: Frostbite
description: An orb of biting cold coalesces around your target, freezing its body.

name: Gale Blast
description: Wind flows from your outstretched hands and whirls around you in a 5-foot emanation.

name: Garden of Healing
description: Spirits of comfort and respite swirl around you, trailing visions of growing grass and blooming blossoms.

name: Genie's Veil
description: Trigger A creature within range is attacked.

name: Gentle Landing
description: Trigger a creature within range is falling You raise a magical updraft to arrest a fall.

name: Ghost Sound
description: You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting.

name: Glamorize
description: Using simple magical gestures, you alter a minor detail of your appearance (add or remove highlights to your hair color, apply or remove cosmetics, add polish or accessories to your nails, etc.) or create a small environmental effect that's confined to your person (adjust surrounding lighting to fav

name: Glass Shield
description: You summon a layer of clear glass to keep you from harm.

name: Glimpse Weakness
description: You glimpse a loose scale, a seam in a foe's armor, or a similar weakness, aiding your allies in landing a precise hit.

name: Glowing Trail
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: Your movements leave a vague glowing path behind you, like a misty echo of your presence.

name: Glutton's Jaws
description: A slavering maw opens beneath a target and tries to take a bite out of them.

name: Goblin Pox
description: Your touch afflicts the target with goblin pox, an irritating allergenic rash.

name: Gouging Claw
description: You temporarily morph your limb into a clawed appendage.

name: Grasping Vine
description: A thick, curling vine erupts from the ground beneath you and stretches to the target, allowing you to move it around.

name: Gravitational Pull
description: By suddenly altering gravity, you pull the target toward you.

name: Gravity Weapon
description: You build up gravitational force and funnel it into your blows, leading to more powerful attacks with blade and bow alike.

name: Grease
description: You conjure grease, choosing an area or target.

name: Grim Tendrils
description: Tendrils of darkness curl out from your fingertips and race through the air.

name: Gritty Wheeze
description: You exhale desiccating grit and sand in a small cloud.

name: Guidance
description: You ask for the guidance of supernatural entities, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends.

name: Guided Introspection
description: You guide the target in examining their innermost feelings, their behaviors, and the motivations behind their actions, granting them clarity and insight.

name: Gust of Wind
description: A violent wind issues forth from your palm, blowing from the point where you are when you Cast the Spell to the line's opposite end.

name: Halcyon Mists
description: In a moment of dire need, you call upon ancestral power to strengthen and sustain.

name: Hallowed Ground
description: One small space becomes inhospitable to undead as you fill it with life-infused benevolent magic.

name: Hand of the Apprentice
description: You take advantage of one of the most fundamental lessons of magic to levitate and propel your weapon.

name: Harm
description: You channel void energy to harm the living or heal the undead.

name: Harrowing
description: The typical harrow reading does not magically manipulate fate, but when you perform a harrowing ritual to infuse a reading with occult power, you can impart real magical benefits to the target of the reading that give them agency and control over a task or goal in their immediate future.

name: Haunting Hymn
description: You echo a jarring hymn that only creatures in the area can hear.

name: Heal
description: You channel vital energy to heal the living or damage the undead.

name: Heal Animal
description: You heal an animal's wounds, restoring 1d8 Hit Points to the target.

name: Heal Companion
description: You heal your animal companion's wounds.

name: Healer's Blessing
description: Your words bless a creature with an enhanced connection to vital energy.

name: Healing Plaster
description: You purify some dirt or mud into a pliable, claylike plaster that can aid in clotting and healing.

name: Heart's Hook
description: You drive two creatures toward a fated meeting.

name: Helpful Steps
description: You call forth a ladder or staircase to help you reach greater heights.

name: Hippocampus Retreat
description: Requirements You're mostly or totally submerged in water.You temporarily shape your lower limbs into the tail of a hippocampus in order to swim away from a nearby foe after dealing a parting blow.

name: Hollow Heart
description: You stoke the target's ambition beyond reason, until it believes no one is capable of helping it, or that others aren't to be trusted.

name: Home Among Mulberry Leaves
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're wielding qi-infused fabric.Qi-formed threads unravel from your fabric on conjured needles as your attack makes contact with an enemy and wraps it in place like an insect in its cocoon.

name: Horizon Thunder Sphere
description: You gather magical energy into your palm, forming a concentrated ball of electricity that crackles and rumbles like impossibly distant thunder.

name: Hurtling Stone
description: You evoke a magical stone and throw it, with divine guide to your aim.

name: Hydraulic Push
description: You call forth a powerful blast of pressurized water that bludgeons the target and knocks it back.

name: Hymn of Healing
description: Your glorious singing mends wounds and provides a temporary respite from harm.

name: Ignite Ambition
description: Trigger You or an ally in range attempt to use a mental effect to convince a creature to do something (such as a , , or a spell).

name: Ignition
description: You snap your fingers and point at a target, which begins to smolder.

name: Ill Omen
description: The target is struck with misfortune, which throws it off balance.

name: Illuminate
description: You light all non-magical light sources in the area that use fire to provide their light—such as candles, lamps, and sconces.

name: Illusory Disguise
description: You create an illusion that causes the target to appear as another creature of the same body shape, and with roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds).

name: Illusory Object
description: You create an illusory visual image of a stationary object.

name: Imaginary Weapon
description: You create a simple weapon of force.

name: Imprint Message
description: You project psychic vibrations onto the target object, imprinting it with a short message or emotional theme of your design.

name: Incendiary Aura
description: You surround yourself with a combustible aura.

name: Infectious Enthusiasm
description: With enchanted gusto, you encourage yourself to get things done and share your motivation with your allies.

name: Information Overload
description: You call on Cobyslarni to open the target's mind to knowledge—too much knowledge.

name: Infuse Vitality
description: You empower attacks with vital energy.

name: Inkshot
description: A spray of viscous, toxic ink jets from your fingertip to strike a target creature in the face.

name: Inner Upheaval
description: You focus your qi into devastating magical attacks.

name: Inside Ropes
description: You pull a large handful of guts from your midsection.

name: Instant Pottery
description: You pull earthen material out of the environment, then shape it into one or more earthenware objects that, in combination, can be up to light Bulk.

name: Interposing Earth
description: Trigger You are the target of a Strike or would attempt a Reflex save against a damaging area effect.

name: Invisible Item
description: You make the object .

name: Invoke True Name
description: You speak the true name of a creature to more surely affect it with your magic.

name: Item Facade
description: You make the target object look and feel as though it were in much better or worse physical condition.

name: Jealous Hex
description: You draw forth a hag's innate jealousy to deny a target its greatest attribute.

name: Join Pasts
description: With touches to the targets' foreheads, you bring them into mental communion.

name: Jump
description: Your legs surge with strength, ready to leap high and far.

name: Juvenile Companion
description: You transform your companion into its juvenile form, such as a cub, foal, kitten, puppy, or piglet, making the target appear harmless.

name: Keen Smell
description: Your nose becomes more sensitive to the scents of the wild, the better for you to track your quarry.

name: Kinetic Ram
description: Gathering kinetic energy, you either focus it in a straight line or disperse it as an encircling ripple.

name: Know Location
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: You create an invisible anchor at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect), as long as you can identify the location by its appearance (or other identifying features).

name: Know the Way
description: In your mind's eye, you magically reorient yourself.

name: Lament
description: You let out your negative emotions in a guttural wail that shakes your enemies' hearts and deals 1d8 mental damage (basic Will save) to each creature in the area.

name: Lay on Hands
description: Your hands become infused with powerful vitality, capable of healing a living creature or damaging an undead creature with a touch.Willing Living Creature The target regains 6 Hit Points.

name: Leaden Steps
description: You partially transform a foe's feet into unwieldy slabs of metal, slowing their steps.

name: Liberating Command
description: You call out a liberating cry, urging an ally to break free of an effect that holds them in place.

name: Life Boost
description: Life force from your patron floods into the target, ensuring they can continue doing your patron's will for just a little longer.

name: Life Link
description: You forge a connection of life energy between you and your target, distributing harm between both of you.

name: Lift Nature's Caul
description: With a wave of the hand, you cause all creatures in the area to see the world around them as if a gauzy film had been lifted away to expose the truth that lies below their perceived reality.

name: Light
description: You create an orb of light that sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) in a color you choose.

name: Lingering Composition
description: You add a flourish to your composition to extend its benefits.

name: Live Wire
description: You conjure up a length of sharp copper filament humming with electrical current that strikes out at your foe.

name: Lock
description: The target's latch mechanism clinks shut, held fast by unseen magical wards.

name: Loremaster's Etude
description: Trigger You or an ally within range attempts a skill check to Recall Knowledge You call upon your muse's deep mysteries, granting the target a greater ability to think and recall information.

name: Lose the Path
description: Trigger A creature in range Strides You surround a moving creature with lifelike illusions, shifting their perception of the terrain to subtly lead them off course.

name: Magic Hide
description: Your animal companion grows a thicker hide, matted fur, or a harder shell, granting it a +1 status bonus to AC.

name: Magic Stone
description: You pour vitality energy into ordinary stones, granting them temporary magical properties.

name: Magic's Vessel
description: A creature becomes a divine receptacle for pure magical energy.

name: Malediction
description: You incite distress in the minds of your enemies, making it more difficult for them to defend themselves.

name: Manifest Will
description: You unleash energy from the broken connection to your patron.

name: Mending
description: You repair the target item.

name: Message
description: You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target.

name: Message Rune
description: You record a message up to 5 minutes long and inscribe a special rune on any flat unattended surface or small object within reach.

name: Mindlink
description: You link your mind to the target's mind and mentally impart to that target an amount of information in an instant that could otherwise be communicated in 10 minutes.

name: Moonbeam
description: You shine a ray of moonlight.

name: Mud Pit
description: Thick, clinging mud covers the ground, 1 foot deep.

name: Murmuration
description: The target feels the brush of feathers against its skin and hears screeches in its ears, warning it to keep away from a creature you designate that's within 30 feet of you when you Cast this Spell (which can include yourself).

name: Mushroom Patch
description: You cause mushrooms to sprout in the area.

name: Musical Accompaniment
description: You're surrounded by orchestral music that shifts and changes to match your behavior.

name: Mystic Armor
description: You ward yourself with shimmering magical energy, gaining a +1 item bonus to AC and a maximum Dexterity modifier of +5.

name: Necromancer's Generosity
description: You channel void energy through your magical connection to your undead minion to strengthen the creature.

name: Needle Darts
description: You shape three needles out of a piece of metal in your possession and send them flying in a tight group toward one target.

name: Needle of Vengeance
description: A long, jagged needle jabs into the target foe's psyche whenever it tries to attack a creature your patron holds in special regard.

name: Negate Aroma
description: The target loses its odor, preventing creatures from passively noticing its presence via smell alone, even if the creatures have precise or imprecise scent.

name: Nettleskin
description: Thorns sprout from your body; they pass through and don't damage any clothing or armor you wear.

name: Noxious Vapors
description: You emit a cloud of toxic smoke that temporarily obscures you from sight.

name: Nudge Fate
description: The barest spin of your patron's spool is enough to alter fate.

name: Nudge the Odds
description: You bestow yourself supernaturally good luck at cards, dice, and other games of chance.

name: Nymph's Grace
description: Your apparition manifests as a mask of unearthly beauty that bewilders your enemies.

name: Nymph's Token
description: You grant an ally a token of favor.

name: Oathkeeper's Insignia
description: Trigger You make a promise or deal.

name: Object Memory
description: By touching an object, you draw forth the experience of those who created and used it.

name: Object Reading
description: You place a hand on an object to learn a piece of information about an emotional event that occurred involving the object within the past week, determined by the GM.

name: Overselling Flourish
description: Trigger A creature damages you.

name: Overstuff
description: Huge amounts of food and drink fill the target.

name: Pact Broker
description: You offer to broker a pact of peace.

name: Parch
description: Dry winds dehydrate a creature.

name: Patron's Puppet
description: Trigger Your turn begins.

name: Penumbral Shroud
description: You envelop the target in a shroud of shadow.

name: Perfected Mind
description: You meditate upon perfection to remove all distractions from your mind.

name: Personal Rain Cloud
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: You conjure a 5-foot-wide rain cloud that follows the target wherever it goes.

name: Pest Form
description: You transform into the battle form of a Tiny animal, such as a cat, insect, lizard, or rat.

name: Pet Cache
description: You open your cloak or create a gap with your hands, drawing the target into a pocket dimension just large enough for its basic comfort.

name: Phantasmal Minion
description: You summon a .

name: Phantom Pain
description: Illusory pain wracks the target, dealing 2d4 mental damage and @Damage[(@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]] damage.

name: Phase Bolt
description: You point your finger and project a bolt of magical energy that stutters in and out of phase until it reaches the target.

name: Phase Familiar
description: Trigger Your familiar would take damage.

name: Physical Boost
description: You temporarily improve the target's physique.

name: Pocket Library
description: Like Vil Seral, you collect information from all around you and store it in book form in an extradimensional library.

name: Practice Makes Perfect
description: Trigger You or an ally within range fails a skill check for a skill in which you or they are trained.The target gains a +2 status bonus to the triggering check, or a +3 bonus if the target has master or better proficiency in the skill.

name: Precious Gleam
description: You temporarily enhance a weapon, replacing it with finer materials.

name: Prestidigitation
description: The simplest magic does your bidding.

name: Protect Companion
description: You extend your aura, as a magical shield that protects your eidolon or minion.

name: Protection
description: You ward a creature against harm.

name: Protective Wards
description: You expand a ring of glyphs that shields your allies.

name: Protector Tree
description: A Medium tree suddenly grows in an unoccupied square within range.

name: Protector's Sacrifice
description: Trigger An ally within 30 feet takes damage.

name: Puff of Poison
description: You exhale a shimmering cloud of toxic breath at an enemy's face.

name: Pummeling Rubble
description: A spray of heavy rocks flies through the air in front of you.

name: Purifying Icicle
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You evoke life essence into the form of water and freeze it, then launch the icicle at a foe.

name: Pushing Gust
description: Giving the air a push, you buffet the target with a powerful gust of wind; it must attempt a Fortitude save.

name: Putrefy Food and Drink
description: You cause otherwise edible food to rot and spoil instantly, and water and other liquids to become brackish and undrinkable.

name: Qi Rush
description: Accelerated by your qi, you move with such speed you become a blur.

name: Quick Sort
description: You magically sort a group of objects into neat stacks or piles.

name: Rainbow's End
description: You reach upward to wrest down a rainbow and harness its power to connect this world to the heavens.

name: Ray of Frost
description: You blast an icy ray.

name: Read Aura
description: You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras.

name: Read Fate
description: You attempt to learn more about the target's fate in the short term, usually within the next day for most prosaic creatures, or the next hour or less for someone likely to have multiple rapid experiences, such as someone actively adventuring.

name: Read the Air
description: You take a deep breath as you survey a social situation, showing courtesy to all around you as your intuition swiftly picks up clues about social contexts and unspoken assumptions of behavior.

name: Reclined Apport
description: Walking over to an item to pick it up is so much effort.

name: Redact
description: You strike mention of a specific name from one or more documents.

name: Reed Whistle
description: You enchant a blade of grass that you can easily hold in your mouth without inhibiting your speech or other actions.

name: Reinforce Eidolon
description: You focus deeply on the link between you and your eidolon and reinforce your eidolon's defenses.

name: Rejuvenating Flames
description: You create a gout of flame that both heals and burns.

name: Restyle
description: You permanently change the appearance of one piece of clothing currently worn by you or an ally to better fit your aesthetic sensibilities.

name: Rising Surf
description: You create a wave of water that you ride, banking around obstacles and surfing to higher ground.

name: River Carving Mountains
description: Your apparition solidifies around you into roaring water and spraying mist.

name: Root Reading
description: You gain general insights into the immediate vicinity by sending your sense through the root systems of trees and bushes.

name: Rousing Splash
description: You cause a splash of cold water to descend on an ally's head, granting some temporary vigor.

name: Runic Body
description: Glowing runes appear on the target's body.

name: Runic Weapon
description: The weapon glimmers with magic as temporary runes carve down its length.

name: Sacred Beasts
description: Requirements You worship a deity.

name: Sanctuary
description: You ward a creature with protective energy that deters attacks.

name: Savor the Sting
description: You inflict pain upon the target and revel in their anguish.

name: Scatter Scree
description: A jumble of rocks cascades into the area.

name: Schadenfreude
description: Trigger You critically fail a saving throw against a foe's effect.You distract your enemy with their feeling of smug pleasure when you fail catastrophically.

name: Scholarly Recollection
description: Trigger You attempt a Perception check to Seek, or you attempt a skill check to Recall Knowledge with a skill you're trained in.

name: Scorching Blast
description: You evoke a mass of fire into the air around your outstretched fist.

name: Scouring Sand
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: You blast the area with grit that scours away soil and gets into creatures' eyes.

name: Scramble Body
description: Your magic throws the creature's biology into disarray, inducing nausea, fever, and other unpleasant conditions.

name: Scrounger's Glee
description: With a cruel laugh and a flash of your canines, you make a target understand that death is coming to claim it and that its demise will serve to strengthen another.

name: Seashell of Stolen Sound
description: Trigger A creature within range begins to make a sound.

name: Sepulchral Mask
description: You manifest a supernatural funerary mask, granting you a +1 status bonus to Will saving throws against emotion effects for 1 minute.

name: Serrate
description: With a pinch, the metal of a weapon twists, adding numerous jagged blades along its surface.

name: Share Burden
description: Trigger An ally within range is about to attempt a saving throw against a harmful emotion effect, and you would not otherwise have to save against the effect.You shoulder some of your ally's pain.

name: Share Lore
description: You share your knowledge with the touched creatures.

name: Share Vision
description: Your patron temporarily links your vision with that of another, causing both of you to be able to see through each other's eyes.

name: Shattering Gem
description: A large gem floats around the target in an erratic pattern.

name: Shield
description: You raise a magical shield of force.

name: Shielded Arm
description: Reinforcing veins of ore run through the target's arm, letting it ward off blows with its bare skin.

name: Shielding Strike
description: As you attack a foe, warding magic transforms your momentum into action and lifts your shield.

name: Shields of the Spirit
description: Requirements You are wielding a shield.You Raise your Shield, causing ephemeral spirit shields to float within your champion's aura.

name: Shillelagh
description: The target grows vines and leaves, brimming with primal energy.

name: Shocking Grasp
description: You shroud your hands in a crackling field of lightning.

name: Shockwave
description: You create a wave of energy that ripples through the earth.

name: Shooting Star
description: You let loose a projectile that flies true and leaves the blazing trail of a meteor behind it.

name: Shroud of Night
description: Your patron blankets the target's eyes in darkness.

name: Sigil
description: You harmlessly place your unique magical sigil, which is about 1 square inch in size, on the targeted creature or object.

name: Signal Skyrocket
description: With a pinch of metallic powder and gunpowder, you call forth blistering red energy that shoots straight upward into the air and explodes, unleashing a crackling boom.

name: Silver's Refrain
description: The "Song of Silver" was an enchanted song used by the Silver Ravens to battle diabolic forces.

name: Sky Laughs at Waves
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're wielding a one-handed weapon in the sword group.You soar and leave the world's squabbles behind before your violent intentions ground you once more.

name: Slashing Gust
description: You slash your hand through the air, channeling miniature ripples of air from each finger to slice your enemy.

name: Sleep
description: Each creature in the area becomes drowsy and might fall asleep.

name: Slime Spit
description: You spit toxic goo that coats your target's face and eyes, dealing 2d6 poison damage.

name: Snare Hopping
description: You may not have placed your snare in the right place, but you can magically move it there.

name: Snowball
description: You throw a magically propelled and chilled ball of dense snow.

name: Song of Strength
description: You bolster your allies' physical strength with a hearty exhortation.

name: Soothe
description: You grace the target's mind, boosting its mental defenses and healing its wounds.

name: Soothing Words
description: You attempt to calm the target by uttering soothing words in a calm and even tone.

name: Soul Siphon
description: You siphon off a portion of the target's soul to bolster your own vitality.

name: Spider Sting
description: You magically duplicate a spider's venomous sting.

name: Spinning Staff
description: You spin your staff with a twirling flourish, attacking two foes and transforming the momentum into magical energy to charge for your next .

name: Spirit Link
description: You form a spiritual link with another creature, taking in its pain.

name: Spirit Object
description: Using a sliver of Baba Yaga's power, you briefly bring a nearby object to life.

name: Split the Tongue
source: Pathfinder #161: Belly of the Black Whale
description: The deceiving creature's tongue splits like a serpent's tongue.

name: Spout
description: Water blasts upward, coming out of the ground, rising from a pool, or even manifesting from thin air.

name: Spray of Stars
description: You fling a spray of tiny shooting stars, dealing 2d4 fire damage.

name: Stabilize
description: Life energy shuts death's door.

name: Sting of the Sea
description: A long tentacle like that belonging to an octopus, anemone, or man-of-war, dripping with briny water, appears from a glowing blue portal to wrap around the target's face, blocking its vision.

name: Stoke the Heart
description: Your patron fills a creature with fervor, empowering their blows.

name: Store Time
description: You store time for later use.

name: String of Fate
description: You bond yourself to a cherished friend, vowing to share their fate for good or for ill.

name: Stumbling Curse
description: With a twist of a finger, you send a creature careening on a haphazard trajectory.

name: Sudden Shift
description: Trigger An enemy misses you with a melee attack.

name: Summon Animal
description: You summon a creature that has the animal trait and whose level is –1 to fight for you.Heightened As listed in the summon trait.

name: Summon Construct
description: You summon a creature that has the construct trait and whose level is –1 to fight for you.

name: Summon Fey
description: You summon a creature that has the fey trait and whose level is –1 to fight for you.

name: Summon Instrument
description: You materialize a in your grasp.

name: Summon Lesser Servitor
description: While deities jealously guard their most powerful servants from the summoning spells of those who aren't steeped in the faith, this spell allows you to conjure an inhabitant of the Outer Sphere with or without the deity's permission.

name: Summon Plant or Fungus
description: You summon a creature that has the plant or fungus trait and whose level is -1 to fight for you.

name: Summon Undead
description: You summon a creature that has the undead trait and whose level is -1 to fight for you.

name: Sure Strike
description: The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll it twice and use the better result.

name: Swampcall
description: You call upon the spirits of the soil to twist and churn, transforming the terrain in the targeted area into a sodden mess.

name: Swarmsense
description: You extend your senses through a multitude of crawling and flying creatures.

name: Swear Oath
description: You loudly and firmly state a course of action that you swear to fulfill.

name: Sweet Dream
description: With your soothing words, you lull the target into an enchanting dream.

name: Synchronize
description: You harmlessly place your unique magic sigil, which is about 1 square inch in size, on your targets.

name: Synchronize Steps
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You link the minds of two targets, enabling them to move in tandem.

name: Tailwind
description: The wind at your back pushes you to find new horizons.

name: Take Root
description: Roots sprout from the flesh of the target and coil across the floor or around objects, reinforcing their stance or grip.

name: Tame
description: As you make comforting sounds and gestures, you approach the target in a friendly manner combining caution and confidence.

name: Tangle Vine
description: A vine appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target.

name: Telekinetic Hand
description: You create a floating, magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and levitates it slowly up to 20 feet in any direction.

name: Telekinetic Projectile
description: You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target.

name: Telekinetic Rend
description: Your mind creates a violent axis of motion in a nearby space.

name: Tempest Surge
description: You surround a foe in a swirling storm of violent winds, roiling clouds, and crackling lightning.

name: Tempest Touch
description: Your touch calls forth a churning mass of icy water that clings to your target, dealing 1d4 bludgeoning damage and 1d4 cold damage.

name: Temporal Distortion
description: You share some of your own temporal distortions with a foe, altering their mind and body unpredictably as they're thrown backward or forward in time.

name: Temporary Tool
description: You conjure a temporary simple tool, such as a shovel or rope into your hands.

name: Tentacular Limbs
description: Your arms turn into long, pliable tentacles, increasing your reach when you're delivering touch range spells and making unarmed Strikes with your arms (such as fist and claw Strikes) to 10 feet.

name: Tether
description: You use magical chains, vines, or other tethers to bind your target to you.

name: Thermal Stasis
description: The same abilities that let you raise or lower thermal energy also let you keep it at a safe medium.

name: Thicket of Knives
description: You create numerous phantom copies of your weapon arm, hiding your true movements and rendering your attacks unpredictable.

name: Thoughtful Gift
description: You teleport one object of light or negligible Bulk held in your hand to the target.

name: Threefold Limb
description: You temporarily transform one of your limbs into water, taking the form of ice, liquid water, or steam as you desire.

name: Thunderous Strike
description: You swing your massive weapon, creating a wave of sonic vibrations that topples creatures.

name: Thunderstrike
description: You call down a tendril of lightning that cracks with thunder, dealing 1d12 electricity damage and 1d4 sonic damage to the target with a basic Reflex save.

name: Tidal Surge
description: You call forth a tremendous wave to move the target either in a body of water or on the ground.

name: Timber
description: You create a small dead tree in your space that falls over on anyone in its path, then immediately decomposes.

name: Time Sense
description: When you Cast the Spell, you gain a perfect sense of time.

name: Torturous Trauma
description: With this spell born of Kemnebi's sadistic love of torture, you batter a creature's internal organs, leaving no external signs of the immense pain you delivered.

name: Touch of Obedience
description: Your imperious touch erodes the target's willpower, making it easier to control.

name: Touch of the Void
description: You infuse the target with void energy, healing undead or damaging a living creature.Willing Undead Creature The target regains 6 Hit Points.

name: Touch of Undeath
description: You attack the target's life force with undeath, dealing 1d6 void damage.

name: Trade Death for Life
description: Your patron steals life from one of your enemies to grant it to another.

name: Traveling Workshop
description: Your apparition guides you through complex procedures while using your magic to provide you with whatever tools you need.

name: Tremor Signs
description: You send a series of tremors, no longer than a short sentence of speech, toward your target.

name: Trickster's Mirrors
description: You are surrounded by up to 3 mirrors that reflect twisted and distorted images of you, making it hard to tell where you actually are within your space and potentially causing those who attack you to hit one of the mirrors instead.

name: Turbulent Tide
description: You cause the sheath of water and the improvised weapon it surrounds to surge outward with stupendous force as you attack.

name: Ulcerous Canker
description: Weeping sores open on the target as you expose it to decay, dealing 1d4 void damage and 1d4 poison damage plus @Damage[(2*ceil(@item.rank/2)-1)[bleed]] damage.

name: Unbroken Panoply
description: As tools of violence undone by violence, broken weapons contain potent symbolic magic that faydhaans often call upon when forming alliances.

name: Undeath's Blessing
description: You instill within a creature the touch of the grave.

name: Unfetter Eidolon
description: You loosen the link between yourself and your eidolon, allowing it to travel farther from you for a short period of time.

name: Unimpeded Stride
description: Divine grace ensure that nothing can keep you prisoner or hold you back.

name: Unraveling Blast
description: You unleash a small blast of potential that destroys one of a creature's possible futures, leaving them reeling.

name: Untamed Form
description: You reach within for a different part of yourself, and you set it free, transforming your body into another form.

name: Untamed Shift
description: You transform just a part of your body.

name: Updraft
description: A powerful blast of wind erupts from the ground, launching the target into the air and sending it crashing back down.

name: Uplifting Overture
description: Your performance makes allies feel they can succeed at anything.

name: Vanishing Tracks
description: You obscure the tracks you leave behind.

name: Veil of Confidence
description: You surround yourself in a veil of confidence.

name: Veil of Dreams
description: Your patron draws the target into a drowsy state, causing daydreams and sluggishness.

name: Vengeful Glare
description: Your gaze falls on a creature, filled with icy vengeance or fiery wrath.

name: Ventriloquism
description: Whenever you speak or make any other sound vocally, you can make your vocalization seem to originate from somewhere else within 60 feet, and you can change that apparent location freely as you vocalize.

name: Verdant Sprout
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: You imbue a single ordinary, inexpensive plant seed with primal energy and throw it onto a surface, where it gradually sprouts into a Medium plant.

name: Verminous Lure
description: Upon casting, the target emits a musk that's captivating to certain animals.

name: Vibrant Thorns
description: Your body sprouts a coat of brambly thorns that thrive on life magic.

name: Victory Cry
description: Trigger An ally within range critically succeeds at a melee Strike.

name: Vindicator's Mark
description: You launch a magical dart at your hunted prey, which marks them with a nimbus only you can detect.

name: Vitality Lash
description: You demolish the target's corrupted essence with energy from Creation's Forge.

name: Void Warp
description: You call upon the Void to harm life force.

name: Waking Nightmare
description: You fill the creature's mind with a terrifying vision.

name: Wall of Shrubs
description: You call forth a line of bushes native to the region to spring from the ground.

name: Warp Step
description: When you walk, the earth warps beneath your feet-your steps extend, distance contracts, and everything is just a little bit closer.

name: Warped Terrain
description: You create illusory hazards that cover all surfaces in the area (typically the ground).

name: Wash Your Luck
description: Some practitioners argue this spell literally washes your fortunes of all influences, malign or benign, while others claim it simply cleanses your mind of obsessions about luck and destiny.

name: Weaken Earth
description: You weaken the bonds that hold earth and stone together.

name: Weapon Surge
description: Holding your weapon aloft, you fill it with divine energy.

name: Weapon Trance
description: The serenity of violence fills your mind, giving you a heightened sense of knowing exactly where your weapons need to be.

name: Weave Wood
description: With a touch, you cause the target to break into fibrous strands that then weave themselves into a woven mundane object of the same Bulk or less, such as a basket, hat, shield, or mat.

name: Whispering Quiet
description: You suppress sound in an area, preventing anyone from giving away valuable secrets.

name: Wildfire
description: A thin layer of ash and flame covers the ground in the area.

name: Wilding Word
description: Your patron's majesty—or their displeasure—comes in a growl from your throat, making other creatures reluctant to harm you.

name: Winter Bolt
description: You fling a hollow icicle filled with winter's wrath.

name: Withering Grasp
description: Your touch rots organic material and decays objects.

name: Wooden Fists
description: Your arms and hands swell with new growth, transforming into tree trunks twice as big as their current size.

name: Word of Truth
description: You speak a statement you believe to be true and that is free of any attempt to deceive through twisting words, omission, and so on.

name: Zenith Star
description: You call a tiny star to orbit a creature in a sparkling halo before shooting up into the heavens, where it marks the creature's rough location.

name: Acid Arrow
description: You conjure an arrow of acid that keeps corroding the target after it hits.

name: Acid Grip
description: An ephemeral, taloned hand grips the target, burning it with magical acid.

name: Advanced Scurvy
description: Your touch afflicts the target with an advanced form of scurvy, a mariner's disease stemming from improper nutrition.

name: Albatross Curse
description: You create a spectral albatross, a guiding bird for sailors, to hover around the target.

name: Allfood
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: You transform one object into an edible substance that any living creature can chew, swallow, and safely digest.

name: Animal Feature
description: Without fully transforming your body, you gain one animalistic feature, which you select from the list below each time you Cast the Spell.

name: Animal Form
description: You call upon primal energy to transform yourself into a Medium animal battle form.

name: Animal Messenger
description: You offer food, and an ordinary Tiny animal within range approaches to eat it.

name: Animate Object
description: You transform the target into an animated object with a level up to that allowed by the Creature Creation Rituals table and of a type corresponding to the object (so a broom would become an animated broom).Critical Success The target becomes an animated object of the appropriate type.

name: Animated Assault
description: You use your mind to manipulate unattended objects in the area, temporarily animating them to attack.

name: Animus Mine
description: You implant a mental mine within your psyche that detonates against anyone attempting to magically manipulate your thoughts.

name: Ash Cloud
description: You summon a tumultuous cloud of ash and smoke.

name: Augury
description: You gain a vague glimpse of the future.

name: Banishing Touch
description: Your touch projects a surge of magic that launches your target safely away.

name: Bee-Man's Summons
description: You recreate the Bee-Man's infamous ability to sense when someone utters their name.

name: Befitting Attire
description: You cloak the targets in an illusion, shaping their clothing and worn items into ones suitable for a particular occasion.

name: Binding Muzzle
description: A shimmering muzzle of pure magical force clamps the target's mouth shut.

name: Blast of the Bellows
description: You create a churning eddy of warm air that makes it difficult to fly within the area.

name: Blazing Armory
description: As long as you have magic, you're never unarmed.

name: Blazing Blade
description: A scimitar-shaped beam of fiery light springs from your free hand.

name: Blazing Bolt
description: You fire a ray of heat and flame.

name: Blistering Invective
description: A heap of insults and invectives spew from your mouth-words so devastating your foes burn from the intensity of your diatribe.

name: Blood Duplicate
description: This spell deals you 1 piercing damage as you shape a magical duplicate of the target from your blood; you can't cast this spell if you don't have blood.

name: Blood Vendetta
description: Requirements You can bleed.

name: Blur
description: The target's form appears blurry.

name: Bonding Meal
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Many grow up and spend their lives eating with others, and doing so binds them—to their families, communities, and cultures.

name: Bone Spray
description: You fire a torrent of jagged bone shards from your hands, dealing 2d10 piercing damage and 1 persistent bleed damage to all creatures in the area.

name: Boneshaker
description: You reach out a hand and seize a creature's skeleton from afar, harming their body and potentially wrenching them by the bones to move them against their will.

name: Bralani Referendum
description: You enforce fair play with punishing zephyrs.

name: Brand the Impenitent
description: You brand the target with an ethereal copy of your deity's religious symbol.

name: Breath of Drought
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: You fill the area with an oppressive, arid swelter that overwhelms creatures with heat exhaustion.

name: Brine Dragon Bile
description: Trigger A creature within range takes damage from a slashing or piercing attack, or one that inflicts persistent bleed damage.

name: Burrow Ward
description: You solidify the earth around you, hindering burrowing creatures.

name: Buzzing Servants
description: You summon a swarm of bees from the city of Axis that rapidly constructs geometric shapes from wax.

name: Calm
description: You forcibly calm creatures in the area, soothing them into a nonviolent state; each creature must attempt a Will save.

name: Canopy Crawler
description: The target grows a prehensile tail, or gains prehensile qualities in their existing tail, to help them climb with ease.

name: Carrion Mire
description: The ground opens into a seemingly endless mass of corpse limbs, grasping at all creatures within the area to drag them down.

name: Cauterize Wounds
description: You seal bleeding wounds with fire.

name: Charitable Urge
description: You speak on the virtue of charity, compelling the target to give away its possessions.

name: Clad In Metal
description: You briefly swap the outer surface of the metal in an object with a suitable amount of a common precious metal from the Plane of Metal.

name: Claws of the Otter
description: Webbing grows between your fingers and your nails extend into vicious claws.

name: Clawsong
description: You sing a fierce prayer, low and growling, and awaken the ancient spirit of a Terwa beast to guide and strengthen the target's unarmed blows.

name: Cleanse Affliction
description: Gentle restorative magic pushes back the effects of toxins and more complex maladies.

name: Cleanse Air
description: You purify the air in the area, making it clean and breathable.

name: Clear Mind
description: You drive mental contamination from the target's mind.

name: Coiling Dance
description: You perform a dance that seeks to pass on the knowledge and wisdom of a naga.

name: Confetti Cloud
description: You conjure a dense storm of swirling confetti.

name: Consecrate
description: Area 40-foot-radius burst around an immobile altar, shrine, or fixture of your deity Secondary Casters 2, must be worshippers of your religion You consecrate a site to your deity, chanting praises and creating a sacred space.

name: Corpse Communion
description: The dead hold more secrets than the living ever shall.

name: Create Food
description: You create enough food to feed six Medium creatures for a day.

name: Create Undead
description: You transform the target into an undead creature with a level up to that allowed in the Creature Creation Rituals table.

name: Cutting Insult
description: You utter an insult so offensive that it cuts your target to the quick.

name: Dancing Shield
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You levitate the touched shield and orbit it around a nearby ally.

name: Darkness
description: You create a shroud of darkness that prevents light from penetrating or emanating within the area.

name: Darkvision
description: You grant yourself supernatural sight in areas of darkness.

name: Deafness
description: The target loses hearing; it must attempt a Fortitude save.

name: Death Knell
description: You snuff the life out of a creature on the brink of death.

name: Dismantle
description: You touch an object, and it immediately disassembles itself into its component pieces.

name: Dispel Magic
description: You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect.

name: Elemental Zone
description: Select an elemental trait: air, earth, fire, metal, water, or wood.

name: Embed Message
description: You specify a trigger and a message up to 25 words long.

name: Empathic Link
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You forge a bond between yourself and the target, enabling you to feel each other's emotions.

name: Empty Pack
description: You render every item inside the container you touch , although the container itself remains visible.

name: Enhance Victuals
description: You transform the target into delicious fare, changing water into wine or another fine beverage or enhancing the food's taste and ingredients to make it a gourmet treat.

name: Enlarge
description: Bolstered by magical power, the target grows to size Large.

name: Enlarge Companion
description: Your animal companion grows much larger, towering over its foes in battle.

name: Entangling Flora
description: Plants and fungi burst out or quickly grow, entangling creatures.

name: Environmental Endurance
description: You shield the target against dangerous temperatures.

name: Erase Trail
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You drastically reduce all signs of one specific creature's passage from the area, including footprints, handprints, dirt, and minor changes caused to the surrounding environment, like the bending of grass.

name: Everlight
description: The gemstone you touch glows, spreading bright light with a color of your choice in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet).

name: Expeditious Excavation
description: Area (continued) cube of dirt 5 feet across or smallerYou remove loose dirt, dust, gravel, sand, and the like (though not solid stone) up to the size of a 5-foot cube.

name: Exploding Earth
description: You throw a hard-packed ball of earth and stone at a creature, and the projectile explodes upon impact.

name: Extract Poison
description: With the lightest touch, you can siphon the poison from an object and save it for your own later use, making an assassin's blade or politician's wine less deadly while you become all the more so.

name: Faerie Fire
description: All creatures in the area when you cast the spell are limned in colorful, heatless fire of a color of your choice for the duration.

name: False Vitality
description: You augment your flesh with the energies typically used to manipulate the undead.

name: Falsify Heat
description: You veil the signs of the fires of vitality, altering the target's apparent body temperature.

name: Far-Flung Fetch
description: You can pilfer an object even if it's outside the reach of your fingers.

name: Fear the Sun
description: You cause the creature's vision to become particularly sensitive.

name: Feast of Ashes
description: You curse the target with a hunger no food can sate.

name: Feral Shades
description: A wave of gray mist formed of void energy spills out from your outstretched hand, briefly taking the shape of a pack of predatory animals that set viciously on your foes.

name: Final Sacrifice
description: You channel disruptive energies through the bond between you and your minion, causing it to violently explode.

name: Fireproof
description: You prevent the target item from conducting heat or catching fire for the spell's duration.

name: Flame Wisp
description: Three faintly glowing wisps of fire float around your head.

name: Floating Flame
description: You create a fire that burns without fuel and moves to your commands.

name: Frog Tongue
description: Your tongue extends unnaturally, flicking out toward a creature within range and dealing 2d8 bludgeoning damage (basic Reflex save).

name: Fungal Hyphae
description: Thin hyphae grow from your feet and plunge into the earth, creating a symbiotic fungal network that attaches to plants within 30 feet and connects you to their root systems.

name: Fungal Infestation
description: Toxic spores swarm over creatures in the area, causing them to erupt in grotesque fungal growths.

name: Gecko Grip
description: Tiny clinging hairs sprout across the creature's hands and feet, offering purchase on nearly any surface.

name: Gentle Breeze
description: A light, soothing breeze flows through the area, making it easier to rest and recover.

name: Ghostly Carrier
description: You create a Tiny, semi-corporeal figure with a form you choose.

name: Ghoulish Cravings
description: You touch the target to afflict it with the overwhelming desire to eat raw meat.

name: Gnaw at the Moon
description: It's said that after his demise at the hands of jealous Fumeiyoshi, Tsukiyo's lunar corpse was left unguarded as the heavens mourned; this provided a humble matron-rat opportunities to nibble at moon flesh and sip upon god blood, a meal which propelled her first steps of apotheosis into Lao Shu Po.

name: Grave Impressions
description: You project a fragment of your senses into the corpse.

name: Guiding Star
description: You call on the constellations of the night sky to guide a creature to the location where you Cast the Spell.

name: Harmonize Self
description: You heal yourself in one of the following ways, chosen by you when you cast the spell.

name: Heartbond
description: You officiate the creation of a magical bond between two or more willing creatures, who are secondary casters of the ritual and must share genuine affection for one another.

name: Heat Metal
description: This spell heats the targeted metal to become red-hot for a moment.

name: Helpful Wood Spirits
description: Upon casting this spell, a cluster of little wood spirits tumbles into the area.

name: Hidebound
description: Trigger A creature within range is hit with a Strike that deals physical damage.

name: Horrifying Blood Loss
description: You curse the target, filling it with terror at the loss of its blood.

name: Humanoid Form
description: You transform your appearance to that of a Small or Medium humanoid, such as a dwarf, elf, goblin, halfling, human, or orc.

name: Hunter's Luck
description: Trigger You attempt a check to about a creature, but you haven't rolled yet.

name: Ignite Fireworks
description: A brilliant and clamorous display of sparks and colorful fireworks explode around your enemies, dealing 1d8 fire damage and 1d8 sonic damage to creatures within a 10-foot burst.

name: Illusory Creature
description: You create an illusory image of a Large or smaller creature.

name: Illusory Shroud
description: You shroud the target in subtle illusions that make it difficult to detect.

name: Imitate Fauna
description: You use your knowledge of nature to pass the target off as a common animal of the same size, representing a species chosen when the spell is cast.

name: Imp Sting
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven
description: You reproduce an imp's evil, poisonous sting, stabbing at an enemy and possibly affecting them with the devil's benumbing venom.

name: Impart Empathy
description: You expand the target's ability to understand social cues that are normally beyond its comprehension.

name: Impeccable Flow
description: You attune yourself to an underlying cosmic order to the world.

name: Inner Radiance Torrent
description: You gradually manifest your spiritual energy into your cupped hands before firing off a storm of bolts and beams that deal 4d4 force damage to all creatures in a 60-foot line.

name: Instant Armor
description: Upon casting this spell, the armor you're wearing is whisked away into an extradimensional space that's linked to you.

name: Inveigle
description: You win over the target's mind, causing it to see you as a close and trusted friend and look upon your every suggestion as reasonable.

name: Invisibility
description: Illusions bend light around the target, rendering it .

name: Invoke the Crimson Oath
description: Brandishing your weapon and shouting the final line of the Crimson Oath, you unleash a blast of destructive ruby energy.

name: Iron Gut
description: Your mouth, esophagus, and stomach become incredibly elastic and tougher than metal.

name: Kgalaserke's Axes
description: The folklore and tales surrounding the legendary hero Kgalaserke are so widespread and well known that a hundred lifetimes would not be enough to have accomplished everything she is reputed to have done.

name: Knock
description: You make the target easier to open.

name: Last Night's Vigil
description: Obscure folktales state on the first day of spring, the Mother of Secrets wanders Tian Xia to dispense her blessings of health upon the frail and old.

name: Laughing Fit
description: The target is overtaken with uncontrollable laughter.

name: Lifelink Surge
description: You make a quick gesture, tracing the link between yourself and your eidolon and drawing on your connection to slowly strengthen your shared life force.

name: Light of Revelation
description: You shed a luminous aura, illuminating a 30-foot radius with bright light.

name: Lock Item
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: One object held by a creature becomes fused to that creature's hand and can't be put down.

name: Loose Time's Arrow
description: You pluck the time stream like a bow-pull one string back, release, and watch a creature fly.

name: Lucky Month
description: You imbue the provided token with luck.

name: Lucky Number
description: When you Cast this Spell, roll 1d20 and make a note of the result.

name: Luminous Stardust Healing
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You scatter twinkling sparks from your sentinel weapon, replenishing your allies' fighting spirit and driving out evil.

name: Magic Warrior Aspect
description: You call upon the aspect of the animal from your mask, gaining physical features reminiscent of that animal.

name: Magic Warrior Transformation
description: You transform into the animal from your mask.

name: Magnetic Attraction
description: You adjust your magnetic polarity, plucking daggers from hands and coins from belts.

name: Magnetic Repulsion
description: You adjust your magnetic polarity, causing metal objects to jump and shudder away from you.

name: Mark of Blood
description: You place a drop of your blood on a weapon and charge it with magic so that you transfer a small amount of your life essence with your attack.

name: Marvelous Mount
description: You conjure a Large fantastical creature to serve as a mount for the target.

name: Mental Map
description: You glean detailed information about a specific place visited by a creature directly from its mind, unless it fends you off with a Will save.

name: Mimic Undead
description: You take death and wrap it about you like a cloak-your colors wash out and your skin grows cold to the touch.

name: Mind Games
description: You lock minds with the target, trying to mentally subdue them.

name: Mirror Image
description: Three illusory images of you swirl about your space, potentially causing those who attack you to hit one of the images instead of you.

name: Mist
description: You call forth a cloud of mist.

name: Noise Blast
description: A cacophonous noise blasts out, dealing 2d10 sonic damage.

name: Oaken Resilience
description: The target's skin becomes tough, with a consistency like bark or wood.

name: One with Plants
description: You can either transform into a plant or merge with plant matter.

name: Osseous Cage
description: You conjure a prison made of bone.

name: Pack Attack
description: You and one other target gain an uncanny coordination that helps you take down foes.

name: Paranoia
description: You cause the target to see all other creatures as dire threats.

name: Pave Ground
description: You even out the ground and push aside low obstacles.

name: Peaceful Rest
description: The targeted corpse doesn't decay, nor can it be transformed into an undead.

name: Penumbral Disguise
description: You wrap the target in shadows, granting it a +1 status bonus to Stealth checks to Hide while in dim light or darkness.

name: Perfect Strike
description: Trigger You miss a Strike with an unarmed attack.

name: Persistent Servant
description: You call forth an unseen servant and task it to perform a specific chore repeatedly.

name: Phantasmal Treasure
description: A phantasmal image of the most precious thing imaginable to the target appears in a location of your choice within the spell's range.

name: Phantom Crowd
description: A tightly packed crowd of humanoids appropriate to the area appear, facing you and agreeing loudly with anything you say.

name: Phantom Ship
description: You create a link between a ship and an undead member of its crew to temporarily make the ship, and its passengers and crew, as incorporeal as ghosts.

name: Power of the Beasts
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia World Guide
description: To simply kill the magical beasts who populate Tian Xia is needless and wasteful.

name: Propulsive Breeze
description: Trigger An ally in range Strides or Leaps.

name: Purify Soul Path
description: You delve inward, spending extensive time contemplating the purity of your own soul and the actions of your past.

name: Quench
