description: You cause the air in the area to become supersaturated with water vapor.

name: Radiant Field
description: You create an area of bright light.

name: Rallying Anthem
description: Your song moves allies to protect themselves more effectively.

name: Rapid Adaptation
description: You flood the target with energy from the terrain around it, compressing centuries of evolution into a single moment.

name: Reaper's Lantern
description: You call forth a ghostly lantern that guides the living toward death and the undead toward true death.

name: Regale the Lost Ones
description: Autumn's shorter days herald an increase in hauntings, which only intensify during winter's cold, dark nights.

name: Resist Energy
description: A shield of elemental energy protects a creature against one type of energy damage.

name: Restoration
description: Restorative magic counters the effects of toxins or conditions that prevent a creature from functioning at its best.

name: Revealing Light
description: A wave of magical light washes over the area.

name: Rime Slick
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: You call down a chill wind.

name: Rite of Repatriation
description: You call upon and apologize to local spirits as you ritually return a culturally important object to its creators, heirs, or resting place.

name: Rubble Step
description: The target leaves behind a trail of shifting rubble that typically consists of stones, but you could choose another earthen material, such as loose sand or soil.

name: Sea Surge
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: You slap or stomp on a nearby solid or liquid surface, sending a surge of water rushing away from you.

name: See the Unseen
description: Your gaze pierces through illusions and finds creatures and spirits.

name: Shadow Zombie
description: You cast a shadow over the target zombie, briefly turning it into shadowy vapor and controlling its movement.

name: Shape Wood
description: You shape the wood into a rough shape of your choice.

name: Share Life
description: You forge a temporary link between the target's life essence and your own.

name: Shatter
description: A high-frequency sonic attack shatters a nearby object.

name: Shining Starlight Attack
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Area varies (see below)You brandish your sentinel weapon, summoning the image of your constellation above your head.

name: Shrink
description: You warp space to make a creature smaller.

name: Silence
description: The target makes no sound, preventing creatures from noticing it using hearing alone.

name: Slough Skin
description: You continually and harmlessly slough off the top layer of your skin while new skin regenerates immediately, quickly moving damaging substances away from your body.

name: Sonata Span
description: By playing a brief tune on an instrument or in song, you cause the notes of the melody to physically manifest into a shimmering, translucent path.

name: Soothing Mist
description: You call forth a magical mist that envelops a creature.

name: Sound Body
description: You send a surge of healing energy to restore the target's body.

name: Speak with Animals
description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals.

name: Spirit of the Beast
description: You bring out the spirit of another animal that lives within your companion.

name: Spirit Sense
description: You open your mind to the metaphysical, enabling you to sense nearby spirits.

name: Spiritual Armament
description: You create a ghostly, magical echo of one weapon you're wielding or wearing and fling it.

name: Spiritual Weapon
description: A weapon made of pure magical force materializes and attacks foes you designate within range.

name: Splinter Volley
description: You launch a volley of splinters at your foes.

name: Spy's Mark
description: By pressing your hand to a wall or other solid immobile surface, you cause the crossed-swords symbol of the Firebrands—or a different symbol of your choosing—to appear on the targeted surface.

name: Status
description: As long as you and the target are on the same plane of existence and both alive, you remain aware of its present state.

name: Stupefy
description: You dull the target's mind, depending on its Will save.

name: Sudden Blight
description: You accelerate the processes of decay in the area.

name: Sudden Bolt
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: You call down a small bolt of lightning on the target, dealing 4d12 electricity damage.

name: Summon Elemental
description: You summon a creature that has the elemental trait and whose level is 1 or lower to fight for you.

name: Summoner's Precaution
description: You create a buffer in the link between yourself and your eidolon in order to prevent you from falling alongside your bonded ally.

name: Summoner's Visage
description: You transform your eidolon into your identical twin.

name: Sun Blade
description: You fire a ray of burning sunlight from your weapon.

name: Sure Footing
description: You free the target's limbs from ailments that impede mobility.

name: Swallow Light
description: You draw magical light into your open mouth, consuming it and turning its essence into fuel for a gout of life-draining shadows.

name: Sweetest Solstice
description: On long winter nights, many families in Tian Xia share a dish of glutinous rice balls.

name: Teeth to Terror
description: The target believes its teeth are falling out, crawling along its face, stabbing into its body, and cramming themselves down its throat.

name: Telekinetic Maneuver
description: With a rush of telekinetic power, you move a foe or something they carry.

name: The Parrot's Whisper
description: You call forth an echo of the gossiping parrot from the tale of the Witch and the Weaver to whisper the secrets of a creature you can see within range.

name: The Queen's Rainbow
description: You tell the story of the Queen of Bees and her retinue trying to pass through a rainbow on their way to visit the King of Spiders.

name: Thermal Remedy
description: You adjust the delicate levels of bitter ingredients in food and drink to draw out their full restorative and fortifying properties.

name: Thundering Dominance
description: You shroud the target in a powerful predatory aura and amplify its vocalizations.

name: Timely Tutor
description: You serve as an astral connection between your eidolon or familiar and the Akashic Record-a demiplane consisting of a comprehensive psychic library-then turn to the creature for advice.

name: Translate
description: The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell.

name: Tremorsense
description: You become aware of vibrations in the ground around you.

name: Triple Time
description: Your music sets a fast pace.

name: Umbral Extraction
description: You prepare to steal spells from your foes, ripping them from the foe's shadow to stow them in an ephemeral pocket in the Shadow Plane.

name: Umbral Mindtheft
description: You prepare to steal a broad field of knowledge from another creature, siphoning it from their mind and storing it in a pocket of the Shadow Plane connected to your own mind.

name: Vicious Jealousy
description: The target is overcome by deep jealousy and resentment that twists its mind against other creatures.

name: Vision of Weakness
description: You focus your gaze on a creature and gain a flash of divine insight into its nature.

name: Voice on the Breeze
description: You whisper a secret message or sound into the wind, which carries it to a designated spot.

name: Vomit Swarm
description: You belch forth a swarm of magical vermin.

name: Warrior's Regret
description: Regret eats away at the target's mind, punishing it for its violence until it ceases its hostility.

name: Water Breathing
description: The targets can breathe underwater.

name: Water Walk
description: The target can walk on the surface of water and other liquids without falling through.

name: Waterproof
description: You prevent the target item from taking on water or becoming wet for the duration of the spell.

name: Web
description: You create a sticky web in the area that impedes creatures' movement.

name: Worm's Repast
description: Gnawing worms materialize within the flesh of the target creature, dealing 4d6 piercing damage and @Damage[floor(@item.level/2)d6[persistent,piercing]] damage.

name: Aberrant Whispers
description: You utter phrases in an unknown tongue, assaulting the minds of those nearby.

name: Access Lore
description: You sift through the multiverse's divine knowledge, seeking out tidbits related to a particular subject.

name: Agonizing Despair
description: Your target's mind tumbles down a deep well of dread, dwelling so intently on deep-seated fears that it's painful.

name: Ancestral Defense
description: Trigger You are about to attempt a Will save.Your ancestor protects you against those who would bend your will.

name: Angelic Wings
description: Wings of pure light spread out from your back, granting you a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

name: Animal Vision
description: You tap into the target's senses, allowing you to sense whatever it senses for the spell's duration.

name: Annunciation of the Outer Gate
description: You announce yourself in the name of certain grim pacts that predate mortal life.

name: Anointed Ground
description: You sanctify the area, sprinkling it with certain oils and warding it against your foes.

name: Antlion Trap
description: You transmute the ground into a conical pit trap of loose sand that becomes difficult terrain for the duration.

name: Aqueous Orb
description: A sphere of water 10 feet in diameter forms in an unoccupied space in range, either on the ground or on the surface of a liquid.

name: Arcane Weaving
description: You and the secondary casters weave together spells (and, if anadis, silk) in a complex ritual that combines magical learning with art, allowing all the participants to share spells they know with one another.

name: Armor of Bones
description: You ossify your physical form, mimicking the durability of bone.

name: Astral Rain
description: You fling a mass of furious thoughts into the air, where they expand into numerous blades or other shapes that rain down.

name: Awaken Portal
description: You attempt to reactivate a dormant gate, portal, or by infusing it with magical energies.

name: Band of Heroes
description: The sun rises on a gathering of heroes bonded to a cause.

name: Battlefield Persistence
description: Trigger You are about to attempt a saving throw, but you haven't rolled yet.You're difficult to deter in battle.

name: Beastmaster Trance
description: You enter a magical trance that allows you to perceive through the senses of the target companion.

name: Behold the Weave
description: You behold the many timelines that weave around a creature, and in so doing, you make one more likely to occur.

name: Bind Undead
description: With a word of power, you seize control of the target.

name: Blastback
description: Trigger You fall more than 10 feet.

name: Blazing Dive
description: Superheated air collects under you, buoying you high into the sky before you plummet back down in a fiery comet.

name: Blinding Beauty
description: You channel the allure of your nymph bloodline into a terribly beautiful glance.

name: Blindness
description: You blind the target.

name: Blood in the Water
description: Requirements The target is taking persistent bleed damage or your last action dealt slashing damage to the target.

name: Bone Flense
description: The target weapon becomes imbued with Achaekek's power and glows softly with crimson light akin to that shed by a candle.

name: Bonewall Bulwark
description: You create a miniature replica of the infamous Bonewall of Yled, a jumble of bones with threatening limbs reaching from it.

name: Bottomless Stomach
description: You create a shimmering extradimensional space accessible from the target's mouth.

name: Bracing Tendrils
description: Visible tendrils of force anchor your body to the ground, preventing unwanted movement.

name: Burglar's Blind
description: The only thing thieves love more than being silent and stealthy is the piles of gold they win with that silence and stealth.

name: Butterfly Bender
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Sometimes, the problems in your life are too oppressive.

name: Cascade Countermeasure
description: You quickly adjust your to offer magical protection.

name: Caster's Imposition
description: A magical interference prevents the target from contributing to any form of cooperative spellcasting.

name: Cave Fangs
description: Sharp flowstone formations protrude from the ground and ceiling, dealing 6d6 piercing damage to creatures in the area with a basic Reflex save.

name: Censure Falsehoods
description: You call on your patron to reprimand a creature that has attempted a Deception or Stealth check against you or an ally within the past month.

name: Chilling Darkness
description: You shoot an utterly cold ray of darkness tinged with unholy energy.

name: Circle of Protection
description: You ward a creature and those nearby against a specified alignment.

name: Claim Curse
description: By burning threads of fate around a target and then retying them to yourself instead, you temporarily draw their curse to you and offer them brief succor from the worst of its effects.

name: Clairaudience
description: You create an floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect).

name: Cloud Dragon's Cloak
description: Trigger You or an ally in range is targeted by a ranged attack.

name: Combustion
description: You ignite a creature in lasting flames.

name: Conjured Conveyance
description: You conjure an intricate vehicle, carved entirely from wood, to serve as a method of conveyance.

name: Consecrate Flesh
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Through the strength of your faith, your body becomes infused with holy energy.

name: Contact Friends
description: You meditate for a quiet moment before your mind seeks out others whom you have befriended, as well as friends of any of the secondary casters.

name: Coral Scourge
description: Barnacles, coral, and other rough aquatic creatures grow on the target's body, getting in between their joints and stiffening their movement.

name: Cordyceps Command
description: You conjure a mote of cordyceps spores uniquely tailored to the target before whisking it at them.

name: Cozy Cabin
description: You shape a cabin 20 feet on each side and 10 feet high.

name: Crashing Wave
description: You summon a crashing wave that sweeps away from you.

name: Crisis of Faith
description: You assault the target's faith, riddling the creature with doubt and mental turmoil that deal 6d6 mental damage, or 6d8 mental damage if it can cast divine spells.

name: Croak Voice
description: You cause the target creature's vocal chords to swell like those of a frog.

name: Cup of Dust
description: You curse the target with a thirst no drink can quench.

name: Curse of Lost Time
description: You curse the target with rapid aging or erosion.

name: Cyclone Rondo
description: Playing or singing melodies discovered by the ancient Shory, you call up a whirlwind.

name: Day's Weight
description: You fast-forward time for a single creature, burdening it with the aches and pain of an entire day and making it temporarily tired and weak.

name: Deceiver's Cloak
description: Your patron drapes a cloak of illusion about you, making you appear as another creature of the same body shape with roughly similar height and weight as yourself.

name: Deep Sight
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: Your eyes darken until they become entirely pitch black.

name: Delay Affliction
description: With a surge of healing energy, you push back against an affliction threatening the target and grant a small amount of healing.

name: Dirge of Doom
description: Enemies within the area are Frightened 1.

name: Disruptive Transfer
description: Using Venorium Blorm's formulas, you calculate a path through space.

name: Distracting Chatter
description: You bombard a target with distracting auditory illusions, surrounding them with a tumultuous cacophony of overlapping speech, whispers, screams, and muttering.

name: Dive and Breach
description: You make the briefest of dives through the Plane of Water.

name: Dividing Trench
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You dig an earthen trench across the surrounding terrain, which must be soil, clay, sand, or other soft earth, but not flooring or stone.

name: Dragon Breath
description: You spew energy from your mouth, dealing 5d6 damage with a basic Reflex save.

name: Drain Life
description: You close your hand and pull life energy from another creature into yourself.

name: Dream Message
description: You send a message to your target's dream.

name: Earthbind
description: Using the weight of earth, you hamper a target's flight, with effects based on its Fortitude save.

name: Eidolon's Wrath
description: Your eidolon releases a powerful energy attack that deals 5d6 damage of the type you chose when you took the Eidolon's Wrath feat, with a basic Reflex save.

name: Electrified Crystal Ward
source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City
description: You create an hazard on the target, creating a special crystalline lock on the object.

name: Elemental Absorption
description: You absorb elemental energy, which you can release as a powerful counterattack.

name: Elemental Annihilation Wave
description: You draw elemental power from your surroundings, and combining it with your own magical energy, unleash a wave of utter destruction and swirling colors that deals 1d6 fire damage and 3d6 bludgeoning damage with a basic Reflex save.

name: Elemental Motion
description: You call upon your element to propel you, improving your Speed depending on your element.

name: Embrace the Pit
description: Devil horns grow from your skull, and your skin takes on features of the devil responsible for your diabolic bloodline.

name: Enthrall
description: Your words fascinate your targets.

name: Entropic Wheel
description: Trigger You deal cold or fire damage to an enemy You stockpile thermal energy in a magical wheel-like construct that lets you burn opponents with cold or freeze their bodies with heat.

name: Envenom Companion
description: You envenom your companion or eidolon's attacks, which drip with highly toxic venom for the spell's duration.

name: Ephemeral Tracking
description: You can look at currents in the air and water and see tracks that you can follow just as you would on land.

name: Excise Lexicon
description: You reach into a creature's mind and extract its knowledge of a word.

name: Extend Blood Magic
description: You call upon the arcane energy coursing through your blood to extend the magic it grants.

name: Extend Spell
description: You call upon your blood's knowledge of the ancients to extend your magic.

name: Eyes of the Dead
description: You enter a magical trance that allows you to perceive through the senses of the target creature.

name: Familiar's Face
description: The target becomes a scrying sensor, allowing you to see through its eyes, smell what it smells, and similarly use its other senses.

name: Far Sight
description: You can see distant objects as if they were closer.

name: Fate's Travels
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: You get a vision of the creature when it was alive, and its last 10 minutes of travel.

name: Feet to Fins
description: The target's feet transform into fins, improving mobility in the water but reducing it on land.

name: Fey Disappearance
description: You become and ignore natural difficult terrain (such as underbrush).

name: Fireball
description: A roaring blast of fire detonates at a spot you designate, dealing 6d6 fire damage.

name: Firework Blast
description: You create a massive display of loud and colorful explosions.

name: Focusing Hum
description: You infuse the air around you with a sustained hum that allows creatures within it to resist distractions.

name: Fungal Exhalation
description: You exhale toxic mold spores that fill the area.

name: Gasping Marsh
description: With a rattling hiss, you create a quickly evaporating mist of invisible poisonous marsh gas to smother creatures in the area.

name: Geas
description: You enforce a magic rule on a willing target, forcing it to either perform or refrain from carrying out a certain act.

name: Ghostly Shift
description: Your body becomes insubstantial as you partially phase out.

name: Ghostly Weapon
description: The target weapon becomes translucent and ghostly, and it can affect material and incorporeal creatures and objects.

name: Glass Sand
description: You throw a handful of sand that transforms into jagged shards of glass.

name: Gravity Well
description: You create a sphere of altered gravity.

name: Guardian's Aegis
description: The guardian's aegis is a ritual used across numerous cultures to bind a chosen guardian and ward together so that they can complete a quest of great import.

name: Haste
description: Magic empowers the target to act faster.

name: Heart's Desire
description: You surround your target with wondrous illusions of their greatest desires, which distract them from reality.

name: Heatvision
description: The target visually senses the heat energy emitted by the creatures and objects around it, gaining infrared vision at a range of 60 feet as a precise sense.

name: Hedge Prison
description: You conjure an intricate hedge prison to trap a creature, encasing them completely in a hollow cube of dense bushes.

name: Heroism
description: You unlock the target's inner heroism, granting it a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception checks, saving throws, and skill checks.

name: Holy Light
description: You shine a blazing ray of light tinged with holy energy.

name: Horrific Visage
description: You briefly transform your features into the horrific visage of a hag, striking fear into your enemies.

name: Hypercognition
description: You rapidly catalog and collate information relevant to your current situation.

name: Hypnotize
description: You create a cloud of mesmerizing patterns and colors that hovers in the air.

name: Ibex's Harvest
description: In the tale "Ibex's Harvest," Ibex turns from the path of a warrior to the path of a farmer, building up their community by working hard and sharing a bountiful harvest not just with their humanoid neighbors but also with their animal neighbors.

name: Impending Doom
description: You sift through myriad potential futures, seize upon one potential moment in which the target meets a particularly gruesome and fatal end, and then show it a vision of its impending demise.

name: Incendiary Ashes
description: A cloud of magical ashes descends upon creatures in the area.

name: Infectious Ennui
description: With a wave of your hand and a short invocation, you cause feelings of ennui and impending doom to well up in the mind of the targeted creature, who must attempt a Will save.

name: Inscrutable Mask
description: You shroud your form and features in an impenetrable mask of shadow.

name: Insect Form
description: You envision a simple bug and transform into a Medium animal battle form.

name: Instant Parade
description: An illusory parade with dozens of participants and performers appears around you, following you as you move.

name: Interstellar Void
description: You call upon the frigid depths of outer space to bring a terrible chill to your enemy.

name: Invoke the Harrow
description: You draw a card from the harrow, either one from a deck you have in hand or magically produce one as part of the spell.

name: Ki Cutting Sight
description: Ki flows through everything in existence—animals and plants, living and dead, mortals and spirits.

name: Lashing Rope
description: You cause a section of rope or a rope-like object to animate, slither to your square, and encircle you, wreathing you in twisting, lashing fibers.

name: Levitate
description: You defy gravity and levitate the target 5 feet off the ground.

name: Life Connection
description: When you cast this spell, you place a failsafe deep within the life force of the target.

name: Life Pact
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Using your life force or spirit as a conduit, you bind the targets in a mystical pact.

name: Lightning Bolt
description: A bolt of lightning strikes outward from your hand, dealing 4d12 electricity damage.

name: Locate
description: You learn the direction to the target (if you picked a specific object, such as "my mother's sword") or the nearest target (if you picked a type of object, such as "swords").

name: Lotus Walk
description: Lotuses, water lilies, and other watery plants bloom at your feet, allowing you to walk on the surface of water and other liquids.

name: Mad Monkeys
description: Magical monkey spirits fill the area as they pile and climb on top of one another.

name: Magical Fetters
description: Ghostly manacles launch from your outstretched hand and clasp around the target's limbs, impeding its movements.

name: Magnetic Acceleration
description: You magnetize a small metal object, such as a nail or coin, and launch it away from you at massive speed.

name: Malicious Shadow
description: Your patron warps the target's shadow into a deadly form, such as strangling hands, a dangerous weapon, harrying runes, or the like.

name: Martyr's Intervention
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Trigger A creature within range would take damage that reduces it to 0 Hit Points Requirements You don't have the wounded condition.

name: Mind of Menace
description: This spell wards against those who attempt to subvert your mind and turns mental magic back on them.

name: Mind Reading
description: With a cursory mental touch, you attempt to read the target's mind.

name: Mindscape Door
description: You project the targets into an immersive mindscape or cause them to exit one.

name: Moonlight Ray
description: You unleash a holy beam of freezing moonlight.

name: Moth's Supper
description: You sigh, and your breath transforms into delicate, black-winged butterflies and huge death's-head hawkmoths.

name: Mycological Malady
description: You infect your target with fungal spores to hasten the cycle of decay.

name: Mystic Carriage
description: This ritual allows you and the other casters to conjure a magical carriage that transports you to a destination of your choice.

name: Nothing Up My Sleeve
description: You create an extradimensional space within each of your sleeves.

name: Noxious Metals
description: This spell forces toxic metal to coalesce on the skin or surface of all living creatures in the area, dealing 4d6 poison damage with a basic Fortitude save.

name: Omnidirectional Scan
description: You quickly view your surroundings from a variety of angles, your senses constructing an overall mental picture.

name: One with Stone
description: You can either transform into a stone or merge with stone.

name: Oneiric Mire
description: You shroud an area in illusory dreamstuff, making the ground look and feel like a deep mire or quicksand.

name: Ooze Form
description: You invoke all things that seep and ooze, your body dissolving into a thick slurry and then reconstituting itself into a Medium ooze battle form.

name: Organsight
description: You see the target as though it's dissected and arrayed before you.

name: Overwhelming Memory
description: You cause the target to recall a specific type of memory you choose from the list below, bringing it to the forefront of their mind with perfect clarity.Gleeful The memory makes the target laugh uncontrollably.

name: Owb Pact
description: You call upon an owb to assist you in a goal.

name: Painted Scout
description: You press your hand to the stone, causing hand-drawn scouts to spread out from your fingers.

name: Paralyze
description: You block the target's motor impulses before they can leave its mind, threatening to freeze the target in place.

name: Perceive the Threads of Fate
description: You open your mind to the grand design of existence, enabling you to view the threads of fate in all their complex, tangled glory.

name: Percussive Impact
description: You lob a compressed ball of sound at a foe.

name: Perseis's Precautions
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Leaving nothing to chance, you weave divinatory precautions against an ambush, alerting the target to danger.

name: Personal Blizzard
description: Your patron's breath becomes blizzard of obscuring, scouring ice that follows your target.

name: Phantasmal Custodians
description: Area 100 feet × 100 feet, up to 20 feet highYou create a long-lasting adaptation of the , forming entities to carry out basic tasks at a fixed location.Critical Success The ritual creates six phantasmal minions.

name: Phantom Prison
description: You completely surround a Large or smaller creature in immobile illusory walls, trapping it inside a false prison it can't escape.

name: Pillar of Water
description: You create a large, self-contained cylinder of still, clear fresh water.

name: Positive Attunement
description: You attune a creature to the Forge of Creation, connecting its life force without fully transporting it.

name: Powerful Inhalation
description: You rapidly draw the air from your surroundings, hoarding it for yourself.

name: Primal Chorus
description: You let loose a primal howl that incites animals and beasts to join in the chorus.

name: Pulverizing Cascade
description: You raise a pair of towering waves and slam them into each other, crushing creatures caught between them.

name: Purging Toxins
description: In the right dose, a scourge can become a cure.

name: Pyrotechnics
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God
description: You turn a fire into either a burst of blinding fireworks or a thick cloud of choking smoke, chosen when you Cast the Spell.

name: Qi Blast
description: You unleash your qi as a powerful blast that deals 2d6 force damage.

name: Rally Point
description: You mark the area touched as a rally point.

name: Ranger's Bramble
description: You cause plants in the area to entangle your foes, with the effects of .

name: Ransack the Night
description: When Fumeiyoshi was punished by the Celestial Court for deicide and fratricide, the rat who would become Lao Shu Po robbed the cangue-bound Fumeiyoshi of a sizable chunk of his shadow.

name: Reincarnate
description: You call forth the target's soul and attempt to incarnate it into a brand-new body.

name: Return the Favor
description: Trigger An ally uses a reaction to grant you a beneficial effect during a combat encounter.

name: Ring of Truth
description: You designate an area in which lies are revealed.

name: Roaring Applause
description: Your flamboyant flourish invokes such powerful feelings in your audience that you incite cheers and applause.

name: Rouse Skeletons
description: Misshapen skeletal forms erupt from a solid surface, such as a stone floor, and fill the burst.

name: Rune Trap
description: You create a magical trap by binding a hostile spell into a rune.

name: Safe Passage
description: Area 10-foot-wide, 10-foot-tall, 60-foot-long section of terrainYou make passage through the area safe for a brief amount of time.

name: Sand Form
description: You grant the target's body and gear aspects of sand.

name: Scrying Ripples
description: You touch the water's surface, and as the ripples spread out, so do your senses.

name: Sculpt Sound
description: You change the sounds made by a creature or object.

name: Sea of Thought
description: You cover the area in a sloshing torrent of semi-solidified thought, roughly ankle high.

name: Secret Page
description: You change the target's text to different text entirely.

name: Seed of Mercy
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia World Guide
description: The gods who value benevolence and the caretaking of small and vulnerable beings also value those qualities in the mortal adventurers who journey through the lands of Tian Xia.

name: Shadow Projectile
description: Trigger An ally within 20 feet of you makes a ranged attack roll.

name: Shadow Spy
description: You mix blood, soil, and shadow together to form a half-real homunculus in the shape of a crow, sparrow, or other bird.

name: Shared Invisibility
description: You and all targets are except to each other as long as the targets remain within the emanation.

name: Shatter Mind
description: You telepathically assail the minds of your foes.

name: Sheltering Wings
description: Trigger An ally moves through a square within 15 feet of you or uses an action that has the move trait.

name: Shift Blame
description: Trigger You or another creature attacks a creature or fails at a Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation check.

name: Shifting Sand
description: Area (continued) a horizontal earthen or sandy surface within a 20-foot burstYou cause the surface to heave.

name: Show the Way
description: You and allies in the area gain preternatural knowledge of the path ahead, allowing you to intuit the best way forward and avoid potential obstacles, such as difficult or confusing terrain.

name: Shrink Item
description: You shrink the target to roughly the size of a coin with negligible Bulk.

name: Shrink the Span
description: You move so fast you blur across planar boundaries.

name: Shroud of Flame
description: You encircle yourself in an aura of protective flames.

name: Sign of Conviction
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You conjure the religious symbol of your deity into the air above you in the same space you stand in, wielding the power of your faith to smite your foes.

name: Slow
description: You dilate the flow of time around the target, slowing its actions.

name: Song of Marching
description: You maintain a brisk performance that keeps allies on the move.

name: Soothing Blossoms
description: Blossoms grow from the ground in a small area, soothing away afflictions and persistent pains and harm.

name: Sparkleskin
description: You coat a creature's body in a layer of brilliantly sparkling glitter.

name: Speak with Plants
description: You can ask questions of and receive answers from plants and fungi, but the spell doesn't make them more friendly or intelligent than normal.

name: Spirit Veil
description: You draw an occluding veil of spirits around yourself, blocking yourself especially well from undead eyes.

name: Steal Shadow
description: You steal a creature's shadow, leaving it weakened and vulnerable.

name: Stinking Cloud
description: You create a cloud of putrid mist in the area.

name: Stone Lance
description: You conjure a jagged lance of stone and then launch it at a foe.

name: Strength of Mind
description: You bolster your ally with reminders of their physical prowess, granting them additional defenses against harmful mental effects.

name: Subjugate Undead
description: You attempt to seize control of the target.

name: Sudden Recollection
description: You place a bit of knowledge deep in a creature's subconscious or make a willing creature forget some information until a specific trigger occurs.

name: Sun's Fury
description: The target weapon becomes wreathed in a glowing flame.

name: Swamp of Sloth
description: Ground in the area turns swampy and fetid.

name: Tattoo Whispers
description: You carefully tattoo the same design upon each secondary caster.

name: Tempest Cloak
description: You shroud one creature in a cloak of fierce, howling winds, shielding it from attacks and making it difficult to approach.

name: Temporal Twin
description: You pull a fleeting duplicate of your ally from the recent past.

name: The Four Hunters
description: This is a story of four evenly matched hunters who sought to capture a falling star.

name: Thief of Fortune
description: Seeing another creature improve themself with magic, you reach out and seize its benefits for yourself.

name: Threatening Mimicry
description: You appear larger and stronger to nearby creatures, appearing to possess threatening features like antlers, claws, or poison to their senses.

name: Threefold Aspect
description: This spell allows you to change between three versions of yourself of different ages: a maiden (young adult), a mother (adult), or a matriarch (elderly).

name: Thunderburst
description: You create a powerful blast of air and a loud peal of thunder, dealing 2d6 bludgeoning damage and 2d6 sonic damage.

name: Time Jump
description: You leap forward a few seconds in time, appearing across the battlefield in the blink of an eye.

name: Time Pocket
description: You fling the target item forward in time and link it to the future of the creature holding it.

name: Time Skip
description: You manipulate time around your ally, pushing them forward a few moments in time.

name: Transcribe Conflict
description: You cause a sheet of paper to appear in your hand, and a moment later a detailed description of a combat you experienced within the last hour is recorded on that sheet of paper in a language that you know of your choice.

name: Travel by Turtle
description: You conjure an intelligent sea turtle, who agrees to carry you upon its shell on a water journey.

name: Unblinking Flame Revelation
description: You light your foe with revealing flame.

name: Unbreaking Wave Advance
description: You unleash a mighty wave from your hand that buffets back your foes.

name: Unfolding Wind Rush
description: You travel on a rushing wind.

name: Unravel Knowledge
description: Your patron reaches into the target's mind, plucking out their past training like pulling a thread from a cloth.

name: Unseasonable Squall
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: You issue a blast of sudden wind that ripples outward from the center of the burst.

name: Unseen Heralds
description: Although this spell has spread throughout the Inner Sea, it likely came first from Nex, where it is used to raise alarms or notify the populace of new policies.

name: Untwisting Iron Buffer
description: You send currents of protective ki to the surface of your body that protect you from harm, at least until your enemies dissipate them.

name: Vampiric Feast
description: Your touch leeches the lifeblood out of a target to empower yourself.

name: Vector Screen
description: One five-foot square.

name: Veil of Privacy
description: You erect protective wards that make the target difficult to detect via magic.

name: Wall of Radiance
description: You create a thin wall of brilliant light in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high.

name: Wall of Shadow
description: You form a wall of pure darkness in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high.

name: Wall of Thorns
description: You grow a wall of thorny brambles from the ground.

name: Wall of Virtue
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You create a translucent wall of light, which draws power from the celestial realms.

name: Wall of Water
description: Raising your hand in the air, you call a massive wave onto the battlefield.

name: Wall of Wind
description: You create a barrier of gusting winds that hinders anything moving through it.

name: Wanderer's Guide
description: You call upon the beyond to guide your route.

name: Warding Aggression
description: You channel a magical ward through your attack and attempt to plant it on a foe.

name: Warning Stripes
description: Your skin becomes painted with vivid stripes or bright aposematic swirls, warning other creatures of its toxic qualities.

name: Web of Eyes
description: You place an scrying sensor on each target just above their eyes.

name: Whirling Flames
description: You call forth a storm of whirling flames, engulfing all creatures in that area and dealing 5d6 fire damage with a basic Reflex save.

name: Whirling Scarves
description: You surround yourself in a vortex of whirling colorful scarves of force that obfuscate you and disorient your foes.

name: Winter's Breath
description: The cold and dour months of winter are an excellent time to gather with friends and family to enjoy a pot of hot tea.

name: Wooden Double
description: Trigger You're critically hit by a damage-dealing effect or a Strike.

name: Achaekek's Clutch
description: You mark the holy symbol of Achaekek in a visible location on the target's body.

name: Adaptive Ablation
description: Trigger You take acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage.You shift yourself to adapt to the mystical wavelengths of the energy damage, protecting yourself from further harm.

name: Aerial Form
description: You harness your mastery of primal forces to reshape your body into a Medium flying animal battle form.

name: Air Walk
description: The target can walk on air as if it were solid ground.

name: Airlift
description: A massive rush of wind lifts, briefly carrying you and everything around you to a nearby destination.

name: Amity Cycle
description: You perform an anbarit, which involves poetry reading, singing, music, and dancing.

name: Anathematic Reprisal
description: Trigger A creature performs an act anathema to your deity.

name: Aromatic Lure
description: You override a target's olfactory senses, luring them to a specific location through tantalizing false scents.

name: Artistic Flourish
description: You transform the target into a form that more closes matches your creative vision.

name: Asterism
description: Area (continued) five 30-foot linesLines of burning starlight form a constellation around you.

name: Atone
description: You attempt to help a truly penitent creature atone for its misdeeds, typically actions anathema to your deity.

name: Bestial Curse
description: You tap into the target's inner being and curse it to become a bestial version of itself.

name: Blight
description: Area 1/2-mile-radius circle centered on you You twist and stunt plants in the area, causing them to wither.

name: Bloodspray Curse
description: You inflict a curse upon the target that causes any wound to gush blood.

name: Bottle the Storm
description: Trigger You would take electricity damage.When lightning is turned against you, you store the charge safely within yourself, unleashing it when the time is right.

name: Bridge of Vines
description: Vines sprout beneath your feet and extend away from you in a straight line up to 60 feet, forming a 10-foot-wide bridge that can cross over difficult terrain and low obstacles, as well as reach higher ground.

name: Bursting Bloom
description: You cause a rose bush to sprout from the chest of a foe, bursting out of its body and wrapping it in thorned vines.

name: Call The Blood
description: With a word and gesture, you cause streams of blood to erupt from the target's mouth, nostrils, ears, or other facial openings and come rushing into your mouth.

name: Call the Ten
description: The Ten Magic Warriors were the first of the Magaambya's students, and they come to your aid even now.

name: Captivating Adoration
description: You become intensely entrancing, and creatures are distracted by you as long as they remain within the area.

name: Chroma Leach
description: Your hand glows with impossible colors from beyond the stars, and your touch saps both color and vitality from the living.

name: Chromatic Armor
description: You wrap the target in armor made of sheets of colored light.

name: Chromatic Ray
description: You send out a ray of colored light streaming toward your enemy, with a magical effect depending on the ray's color.

name: Cinder Swarm
description: You breathe life into a mass of fiery critters.

name: Clairvoyance
description: You create an floating eye at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect).

name: Clinging Shadows Stance
description: You adopt the stance of clinging shadows.

name: Cloak of Light
description: You surround yourself in holy light that restores the living and rebuffs undead.

name: Clownish Curse
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God
description: You afflict the target with a curse that causes it to emit ridiculous noises as it moves.

name: Commanding Lash
description: With the threat of more pain, you compel a creature you've recently harmed.

name: Commune with Corazal
description: You tap into Corazal's innumerable senses to identify disturbances throughout the Verduran Forest.

name: Community Repair
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind
description: You lead your community in repairing a public work, such as a bridge, well, or mural, through the power of memory and art.

name: Community Restoration
description: Trigger You Cast a Spell from a wizard spell slot, and the spell affects one or more willing allies without damaging them.

name: Compel True Name
description: You instruct the target to do something, compelling obedience by calling it by its true name.

name: Competitive Edge
description: Your competitiveness drives you to prove yourself against the opposition.

name: Concealment's Curtain
description: At twilight for 5 days, you line the fruit in front of the mirror, chanting the name of the target, and envisioning its eyes in your mind.

name: Confront Selves
description: You show the target the spiraling web of actions and consequences that is their life and the changes wrought by these decisions upon themselves and those around them.

name: Confusion
description: You befuddle your target with strange impulses, causing it to act randomly.

name: Conjured Clockwork
source: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun
description: You conjure a complex clockwork device on the ground and cause it to slowly spread across the battlefield.

name: Containment
description: You wrap a creature in an immobile force field, whether to protect it or those around it.

name: Coral Eruption
description: Area two 10-foot bursts that don't overlap Razor sharp coral growths erupt from the ground, transforming the landscape into a dangerous coral reef.

name: Countless Eyes
description: Eyes form across the touched creature's body, allowing it to see in all directions at once.

name: Creation
description: You conjure a temporary object from magical energy.

name: Darkened Eyes
description: You infuse a creature's vision with darkness.

name: Darkened Sight
description: You infuse a creature's vision with darkness.

name: Dawnflower's Light
description: The object glows with soft golden light that lays bare the truth, reveals hidden objects, and shines supernatural light on false orders.

name: Daydreamer's Curse
description: You impose a curse upon the target that renders it easily distracted and unable to focus its thoughts on tasks that demand insight or discernment.

name: Deathless March
description: You chant a marching song of Yled to empower the undead and terrify the living.

name: Debilitating Dichotomy
description: You reveal a glimpse of the impossible conflicts between the divine anathema behind your curse, forcing you to reckon with another's conflicts as well.

name: Delusional Pride
description: You make the target overconfident, leading it to ascribe failure to external factors.

name: Destructive Aura
description: Swirling sands of divine devastation surround you, weakening the defenses of all they touch.

name: Detect Creator
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You examine the remains or spiritual residue of a destroyed undead creature to locate that undead's creator, perhaps a necromancer or vampire.

name: Detect Scrying
description: By reading trace auras, you detect the presence of scrying effects in the area.

name: Diamond Dust
description: You supercool the nearby air, forming a cloud of dancing ice crystals in an emanation around you.

name: Dimensional Steps
description: You teleport to a location up to 20 feet away within your line of sight.

name: Dinosaur Form
description: You channel the primal forces of nature to transform into a Large animal battle form, specifically that of a powerful and terrifying dinosaur.

name: Dirge of Remembrance
description: You sing a funereal dirge to force restless spirits to fully manifest in the Material Plane.

name: Discern Lies
description: Falsehoods ring in your ears like discordant notes.

name: Dispelling Globe
description: You create an immobile globe around yourself that attempts to counteract any spell from outside the globe whose area or targets enter into the globe, as if the globe were a spell 1 rank lower than its actual spell rank.

name: Disperse into Air
description: Trigger You take damage from an enemy or a hazard.

name: Divine Wrath
description: You channel the fury of divinity against your foes.

name: Door to Beyond
description: Striking at thin air, you create hairline cracks in an unoccupied adjacent space that lead somewhere outside reality.

name: Downpour
description: You call forth a torrential downpour, which extinguishes non-magical flames.

name: Draw the Lightning
description: Calling out to the skies, you summon a bolt of lightning to strike through a foe above you and down into your weapon or your body, charging it with electrical power.

name: Dreamer's Call
description: You create a vivid, illusory daydream drawn from the images of the target's dreams.

name: Dull Ambition
description: You curse the target to fail in all avenues of its life that require drive and ambition, as it inadvertently undermines its own goals at every turn.

name: Dust Storm
description: You call forth a swirling storm of dust.

name: Dutiful Challenge
description: As you challenge an enemy, you take some of its attention away from your allies.

name: Ectoplasmic Interstice
description: You force the mortal Universe and Ethereal Planes to partially merge, creating a zone that causes incorporeal and spiritual entities to take on many of the aspects of corporeal creatures.

name: Elemental Gift
description: An elemental force fills your target, granting the target the swiftness of air, the ruggedness of earth, the sting of fire, or the flexibility of water, depending on which element you choose.

name: Elemental Sense
description: The elements grant you sensory enhancements.

name: Elemental Tempest
description: Your spellcasting surrounds you in a storm of elemental energy.

name: Elephant Form
description: You channel the primal forces of nature to transform into a Large battle form, specifically that of a powerful and terrifying elephant or similar creature, such as a mammoth, mastodon, or anancus.

name: Enduring Might
description: Trigger An attack or effect would deal damage to you.

name: Energy Absorption
description: Trigger An effect would deal acid, cold, electricity, or fire damage to you You're used to mitigating the damage done by bombs, siege engines, and magical artillery.

name: Enervation
description: Extending a finger, you fire a beam of void energy that weakens the life force of any creature it touches.

name: Enhance Senses
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You enhance the target's senses.

name: Entangle Fate
description: You cause a swirl of energy to entangle the fates of all caught within the blast.

name: Ephemeral Hazards
description: Area (continued) four 10-foot-by-10-foot spacesYou create illusory hazards, such as spinning blades or a puddle of acid, in four 10-foot-by–10-foot spaces within range.

name: Eradicate Undeath
description: A massive deluge of life energy causes the undead to fall apart.

name: Euphoric Renewal
description: You view death not as an ending but a beginning, and you delight in dancing on its edge.

name: Extract Brain
description: You perform a complex magical operation on a willing or creature or a corpse, delicately cutting into the skull and removing the creature's brain without damaging the organ.

name: Fallow Field
description: A sickly yellow light fills the area as entropic forces prevent healing.

name: False Nature
description: You create an illusion that makes an object seem to be something entirely different.

name: Familiar Form
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You transform into a Tiny animal that commonly serves as a spellcaster's familiar.

name: Favorable Review
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God
description: You enchant a creature to ensure they have only good things to say about your show.

name: Fearful Feast
description: Trigger A creature within range becomes You open your mouth wide and inhale sharply; you draw in the bravery, self-confidence, and hope to which the frightened target clings and then strip away the target's false assumption that these fragile emotions can save them from the oblivion of terror.

name: Fey Form
description: Channeling the mischievous fey, you transform into a fey battle form, which is Medium unless stated otherwise.

name: Fire Shield
description: You create a hovering shield made of fire.

name: Flame Barrier
description: Trigger An effect would deal fire damage to either you or an ally within range.

name: Flicker
description: You flicker quickly between your current plane and another.

name: Fly
description: The target can soar through the air, gaining a fly Speed equal to its Speed or 20 feet, whichever is greater.

name: Font of Serenity
description: A divine beacon radiates serenity, soothing nearby allies.

name: Forgotten Lines
description: Members of the Lacunafex and other allies use this spell to restore material that Thrune agents have redacted from historical or otherwise valuable texts.

name: Fortissimo Composition
description: You call upon your muse to greatly increase the benefits you provide with your courageous anthem, rallying anthem, or song of strength composition.

name: Foul Miasma
description: You multiply the disease within a creature, drawing it into an infectious mist outside their body where it can spread to other creatures.

name: Garden of Death
description: Typically associated with the less friendly fey or druids, this ritual calls all the poisonous, toxic, and venomous plants and animals of an area to congregate in a certain place, creating a beautiful but extravagantly deadly garden.

name: Ghostly Tragedy
description: This spell compels local spirits to reenact a violent event of the recent past that you're aware of and name as you Cast the Spell.

name: Ghostly Transcription
description: Glowing letters assemble in the air, providing a transcription of the target's speech in all languages you speak.

name: Girzanje's March
description: You sing a prayer for war, inspiring valor in allies who hear your song.

name: Glass Form
description: You grant the target properties of dull, transparent glass.

name: Glimpse the Truth
description: Divine insight lets you see things as they are, unveiled by attempts to magically cloak the truth.

name: Grasp of the Deep
description: You grip one target with the phantasmal pressure of the deep sea, disorienting and crushing its lungs and joints.

name: Grasping Earth
description: Handlike protrusions of rock and soil grab and bury creatures.

name: Holy Cascade
description: You call upon sacred energy to amplify a vial of , tossing it an incredible distance.

name: Honeyed Words
description: Falsehoods pass your lips as smoothly as silk.

name: Hydraulic Torrent
description: A swirling torrent of water manifests along a straight line, battering creatures and unattended objects in its path and possibly pushing them away from you.

name: Ice Storm
description: You create a gray storm cloud that pelts creatures with an icy deluge.

name: Implement of Destruction
description: You solemnly declare that the target weapon will bring death to a foe, implanting an irrational fear of the weapon into the target enemy.

name: Inevitable Destination
description: You twist the paths of the target, ensuring that each one leads to you.

name: Infectious Melody
description: You call forth the chords of a tune so catchy that foes hearing it can't help but sing along, making it harder for them to communicate.

name: Infiltrator's Tunnel
description: It's best to know the ingress and egress points for any location you plan to rob.

name: Interdisciplinary Incantation
description: Trigger A creature within 30 feet casts an arcane spell.

name: Internal Insurrection
description: You afflict the target with the supernatural disease known as internal insurrection, causing portions of their body to rebel against the whole, leading to painful agonies and, in time, death.

name: Invisibility Cloak
description: You become , with the same restrictions as the 2nd-rank spell.

name: Invisibility Curtain
description: You create a transparent invisible wall that makes any creatures on one side of the wall invisible to those on the other side.

name: Isolation
description: You summon a tangible manifestation of loneliness to cloak the target from view as surely as if it were wreathed in darkness.

name: It is Written
description: You envision a future for yourself, confident in the certainty that this vision is your destiny.

name: Know the Enemy
description: Trigger You roll initiative and can see a creature, you succeed at an attack roll against a creature, or a creature fails a saving throw against one of your spells.

name: Life Siphon
description: Trigger You expend one of your wizard spell slots to cast a wizard spell of the necromancy school.

name: Life-Draining Roots
description: Thorny roots erupt from your hands in a tangled cascade, puncturing creatures in the way of their growth and revitalizing you.

name: Life's Flowing River
description: You create a volume of faint shimmering light that resembles a flowing river and sheds dim light for 10 feet on each side.

name: Life's Fresh Bloom
description: The ground around you blooms with life, sprouting sparkling grass, flowers, and small shrubs.

name: Liminal Doorway
description: You draw a chalk doorway on an unbroken surface, which opens into an extradimensional space.

name: Localized Quake
description: You shake the earth, toppling nearby creatures.

name: Lucky Break
description: Trigger You fail, but don't critically fail, a saving throw.

name: Luring Wail
description: You emit a plaintive cry to lure your enemies closer.

name: Magic Mailbox
description: You create an interdimensional link between two containers, both of which must be capable of being closed in such a way that their contents aren't visible.

name: Malignant Sustenance
description: You embed a seed of void energy in an undead creature, restoring its unnatural vigor.

name: Mantis Form
description: You become a mantis.

name: Mantis's Grasp
description: You cause red, ghostly mantis arms to sprout from a nearby surface and crush a creature, dealing 8d6 force damage and attempting to pin the target in place.

name: Mercurial Stride
description: Your form ripples as you take on the fluidity and toxicity of quicksilver.

name: Mirage
description: You create an illusion that causes natural terrain to look, sound, feel, and smell like a different kind of terrain.

name: Mirror's Misfortune
description: You split into your real self and a mirrored version of yourself that curses would-be attackers with misfortune on their next attacks.

name: Misty Memory
description: Some say water holds memories or impressions of the past, and you can raise those memories to the surface to glimpse recent events.

name: Morass of Ages
description: You surround yourself in temporal eddies that draw out time for those around you, making every step feel like an eternity endured.

name: Mountain Resilience
description: The target's skin hardens like the stone of a mountain face.

name: Movanic Glimmer
description: You give the target animal a glimmer of awareness, not truly awakening it but allowing it to better understand its surroundings.

name: Murderous Vine
description: You summon a slithering, thorny vine that attempts to constrict and crush a foe against a wall or other surface.

name: Mutilate
description: You cut your own body in a ritualistic manner, causing similar damage to a creature in your line of sight.

name: Mystic Beacon
description: The next damaging or healing spell the target casts before the start of your next turn deals damage or restores Hit Points as if the spell were heightened 1 rank higher than its actual rank.

name: Nature's Bounty
description: A palm-sized raw fruit or vegetable of your choice appears in your open hand.

name: Necrotic Radiation
description: You imbue the touched object or space with slow-acting necrotic radiation.

name: Nightmare
description: You send disturbing nightmares to your target.

name: Ocular Overload
description: Just as a creature is about to attack you, you assault them with jarring illusions, completely surrounding their eyes with blinding flashes of motion and color.

name: Ordained Purpose
source: Pathfinder #161: Belly of the Black Whale
description: You call upon the authority of cosmic forces of order, overwhelming creatures with remorse and agony for acting outside of their station and purpose.

name: Outcast's Curse
description: You afflict the target with a curse that makes its presence abrasive and off-putting.

name: Overflowing Sorrow
description: Sadness flows out of you into nearby creatures, blotting out any other thoughts they had.

name: Painful Vibrations
description: You send powerful sound waves through an opponent's body, vibrating its bones and internal organs painfully.

name: Path of Least Resistance
description: You trace several possible routes, quickly resetting the timeline until you find the safest one.

name: Peaceful Bubble
description: An opaque shell of drifting, iridescent runes covers the area, creating a bubble.

name: Perfected Body
description: Trigger You fail or critically fail a saving throw against an effect that has the morph, poison, or polymorph trait, or that would make you , , , , or .

name: Pernicious Poltergeist
description: You create an echo of a powerful poltergeist, temporarily anchoring it to the area to terrorize and harm any opponents foolish enough to remain in the area.

name: Personal Runewell
description: Area (continued) 15-foot radius, 30-foot-tall cylinderThe runelords of Thassilon pioneered the creation of runewells, magical artifacts that could extract and store the power of sin magic from mortal souls.

name: Petal Storm
description: You bring forth a cloud of razor-sharp flower petals that thrash violently in the wind.

name: Phantasmal Killer
description: You create a phantasmal image of the most fearsome creature imaginable to the target.

name: Phantasmal Protagonist
description: You create a phantasmal incarnation of a significant character from a novel, historical work, or religious parable.

name: Phoenix Ward
description: You raise a fiery shield around yourself, gaining resistance 10 to fire.

name: Planar Tether
description: You stitch the target to its current plane.

name: Plant Growth
description: Area 1/2-mile-radius circle centered on you You cause the plants within the area to be healthier and more fruitful.

name: Precious Metals
description: Your deity blesses base metals to transform them into precious materials.

name: Procyal Philosophy
description: The racoon-like visage of a sagacious procyal appears, dispensing helpful advice.

name: Prophet's Luck
description: Trigger You or a creature within range attempts a saving throw against an obvious threat.

name: Protector's Sphere
description: A protective aura emanates out from you, safeguarding you and your allies.

name: Pulse of Civilization
description: You tap into the zeitgeist of any settlements in range.

name: Purifying Veil
description: Drawing on the purifying powers of water, you call forth a veil of fine water droplets suffused with holy energy.

name: Radiant Beam
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You fire a beam of blinding light from your outstretched hands.

name: Radiant Heart of Devotion
description: You speak a fervent prayer for the heavens to assist you and your righteous allies.

name: Ranage's Circle
description: Many stories tell of a clearing deep in the Mwangi jungle, surrounded by ancient cypress trees.

name: Ravenous Portal
description: You place a ward upon the door that triggers when a creature attempts to open, unlock, or destroy the door.

name: Read Omens
description: You peek into the future.

name: Rebounding Barrier
description: Trigger You are hit by a physical Strike.

name: Rebuke Death
description: You snatch creatures from the jaws of death, restoring them without the straing of a typical close call.

name: Recall Past Life
description: You and the secondary casters spend 2 days drawing sigils on one another.

name: Reflected Beauty
description: When you cast reflected beauty, choose a willing creature that's the same size as you and that you can see within 30 feet.

name: Reflective Scales
description: You grow a set of colored, glowing scales or scaled armor that stores energy before releasing it in a final burst.

name: Remember the Lost
description: You call upon the lost and forgotten, assailing your foes' minds with the memories of those who died with a grievance toward them.

name: Repel Metal
description: Trigger A Strike with a metallic weapon or projectile would hit you or an ally within range.

name: Replicate
description: You create an illusory magical double that physically looks and behaves very similarly to the target.

name: Rest Eternal
description: You call upon gods, spirits, and stranger beings to bar a creature's spirit from ever returning.

name: Retreat Among the Rains
description: Ganhil developed this ritual to emulate the epiphanies and flowing mental states he experienced during 4718's Challenge of Sky and Heaven: intense focus, emotional acceptance, dilated perceptions, and growing awareness of elemental perfection.

name: Retributive Pain
description: Trigger A creature in range damages you.

name: Rewrite Memory
description: You alter the target's memories by erasing a memory, enhancing a memory's clarity, altering a memory, or adding a false memory.

name: Rigid Form
description: You utilize wood's rigidity to prevent harmful shapechanging effects.

name: Roar of the Dragon
description: You channel the might of dragons into your voice, letting out a roar that engenders respect in dragonkind but that instills fear in most other creatures.

name: Rope Trick
description: You cause the target rope to rise vertically into the air.

name: Rune of Observation
description: You inscribe an invisible eye-shaped rune in the air, creating a sensor as .

name: Runic Impression
description: Your unarmed attacks or weapon gain the benefits of a weapon rune you choose when you cast this spell: , , , , , , or .

name: Rust Cloud
description: Red-blown flecks of rust jitter in the air, forming a cloud of agitated particles.

name: Rusting Grasp
description: You cause the target to rapidly rust.

name: Sacred Nimbus
description: You summon a small, fluffy white nimbus cloud that floats 10 feet above the ground and rains down pleasantly warm sanctified water.

name: Safeguard Secret
description: You ensure a secret remains safe from prying spies.

name: Sage's Curse
description: You afflict the target with a curse that fills its mind with distracting and hyperspecialized minutiae, causing it to second-guess even simple facts.

name: Sanguine Mist
description: You unleash a cloud of foul, blood-sucking fog that drains the vitality from the living to bolster your own.

name: Seal Fate
description: You utter a curse that a creature will meet a certain end—a death by freezing, stabbing, or another means you devise.

name: Shadow Double
description: You create an illusory duplicate of the target creature by drawing shadowy material from the Netherworld and sculpting it into a semi-solid form.

name: Shaken Confidence
description: Trigger An enemy within 30 feet of you critically fails an attack roll, Perception check, or skill check.

name: Shape Stone
description: You shape the stone into a rough shape of your choice.

name: Shared Nightmare
description: Merging minds with the target, you swap distressing visions.

name: Shifting Form
description: You change your body to better suit the moment.

name: Show the Path
description: You grant the target insight on things to come, guiding them toward a fate they find most fitting and encouraging them to continue this journey.

name: Shroud of the Mantis
description: You wrap yourself in a crimson cloak that renders you , with the same restrictions as a 2nd-rank spell.Heightened (6th) The duration increases to 10 minutes.

name: Sliding Blocks
description: You conjure up to six 5-foot stone cubes you can gently move with a gesture.

name: Snake Fangs
description: Your jaw unhinges as your teeth extend into wicked fangs.

name: Soft Landing
description: You create a magical field that buoys any creature or object falling into the area, providing a harmless landing from any height.

name: Solid Fog
description: You conjure a bank of fog so thick it impedes movement as well as sight.

name: Songbird's Call
description: Your voice calls a storm of songbirds that whirl around you and peck at your enemies.

name: Soothing Spring
description: Steam wisps into the air as a stone-lined pool appears in the ground and fills with hot water that bubbles up from the earth.

name: Spell Immunity
description: You ward a creature against the effects of a single spell.

name: Spike Stones
description: Long, sharp spikes of solid rock thrust up from the ground in the area.

name: Spiral of Horrors
description: Shades and spirits howl and whirl around you in a display that strikes fear into the hearts of all who witness it.

name: Spiritual Anamnesis
description: Memories of a past life that seem incredibly real (and may even be) overwhelm the target's mind.

name: Spiritual Attunement
description: You attune yourself to a spiritual plane of the Outer Sphere, connecting your spirit without fully transporting to it.

name: Stasis
description: The flow of time congeals around an object or creature, holding it in place.

name: Steal Voice
description: You steal a creature's voice, rendering them mute.

name: Stifling Stillness
description: You make all air in the target area unnaturally still and unyielding, creating a shimmering haze.

name: Stonesense
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: You gain tremorsense as an imprecise sense to a range of 100 feet, but you can only sense vibrations through natural stone (not masonry, adobe, or any other manufactured edifice).

name: Stormwind Flight
description: Powerful winds carry you smoothly through the air, giving you a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

name: Suggestion
description: Your honeyed words are difficult for creatures to resist.

name: Swarm Form
description: You discorporate into a swarm of Tiny creatures.

name: Swarming Wasp Stings
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven
description: You manifest a swarm of disembodied wasp stingers that stab creatures in the area, possibly poisoning them.

name: Take its Course
description: When someone has overindulged, you can hasten them past the worst of their affliction or intensify their misery.

name: Talking Corpse
description: You grant the target corpse a semblance of life, which it uses to speak the answers to three questions posed to it.

name: Telepathy
description: You can communicate telepathically with creatures within 30 feet.

name: Tempt Fate
description: Trigger You or an ally within range attempts a saving throw.

name: Tireless Worker
description: You suppress your choice of one of the following conditions that's affecting the target: , , , or .

name: Tomorrow's Dawn
description: The golden light of a new dawn and the promise of life beyond death radiates from your body.

name: Tortoise and the Hare
description: You prove that slow and steady doesn't always win the race by turning a foe into a proverbial tortoise and yourself or an ally into a hare, siphoning some of the foe's speed and granting it to the other target.

name: Touch of the Moon
description: When you touch the target, a symbol of the moon appears on its forehead, glowing with soft moonlight.

name: Transcribe Moment
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You instantly create a small, permanent scroll that contains a magically precise written description of your current surroundings in every direction.

name: Translocate
description: You instantly transport yourself and any items you're wearing and holding from your current space to an unoccupied space within range you can see.

name: Traveler's Transit
description: You add power to your muscles, allowing you to swim or climb walls with ease.

name: Trickster's Feathers
description: You conjure four magic feathers, each with the potential to hold a single illusory guise.

name: Trickster's Twin
description: You rarely settle for being in just one place.

name: Umbral Graft
description: You reflect a spell into a shadowy version of itself, in the process depleting the power of the initial spell.

name: Unfettered Movement
description: You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement.

name: Unity
description: Trigger You and 1 or more allies within range are targeted by a spell or ability that allows a saving throw.

name: Unsettling Knowledge
description: You share a piece of hidden knowledge with a creature that is both upsetting and intriguing.

name: Vampiric Maiden
description: A ghostly iron maiden snaps shut on the target and drains its vitality for your gain.

name: Vapor Form
description: The target transforms into a vaporous state.

name: Variable Gravity
description: You can adjust how strongly gravity grips you, changing between low gravity, normal gravity, and high gravity with ease.

name: Vision of Beauty
description: You create a phantasmal image of the most beautiful creature imaginable to the target at a location somewhere within the spell's range.

name: Vision of Death
description: You force the target to see a vision of its own death.

name: Vital Beacon
description: Vitality radiates outward from you, allowing others to supplicate and receive healing.

name: Vital Luminance
description: Drawing life force into yourself, you become a beacon of vitality.

name: Waking Dream
description: You cloud the target's mind with vivid, dreamlike imagery, so they have difficulty distinguishing real threats from imagined ones.

name: Wall of Fire
description: You raise a blazing wall that burns creatures passing through it.

name: Wall Of Mirrors
description: You create a solid wall of shimmering reflective glass up to 50 feet long and 20 feet high.

name: Weapon Storm
description: Area 30-foot cone or 10-foot emanationYou swing a weapon you're holding, and the weapon magically multiplies into duplicates that swipe at all creatures in either a cone or an emanation.

name: Weaponize Secret
description: You understand that holding a secret is in itself a kind of power.

name: Web of Influence
description: You learn the location of the nearest creature to whom the target is connected in a magical manner.

name: Whispers of the Void
description: You whisper baleful secrets that transcend language and carry magically to the ears of your foes.

name: Wild Feast
description: You draw forth latent hostility in the local flora and fauna.

name: Wild Winds Stance
description: You take on the stance of the flowing winds, sending out waves of energy at a distance.

name: Wind Whispers
description: You call forth numerous breezes in which you weave gossip, whispering subtly into the ears of those around.

name: Winning Streak
description: The target is energized by its good fortune as it spreads to others-as long as they keep winning.

name: Wood Walk
description: Wood shapes itself according to your will readily, making staircases appear as you climb up the side of a tree, automatically weaving vines into ladders, or lowering branches to lift you up to the top.

name: Word of Freedom
description: You utter a liberating word of power that frees a creature.

name: Wordsmith
description: You're a devotee of knowledge with an unmatched command of the language used to spread that knowledge, and you can reshape the written word into a form more understandable to your audience.

name: Ymeri's Mark
description: You place the fiery mark of the Queen of the Inferno on the target, burning into the creature's very essence.

name: Zeal for Battle
description: Trigger You and at least 1 ally are about to roll initiative.

name: Zephyr Slip
description: Trigger A creature enters a space within 5 feet of you.

name: Aberrant Form
description: Harnessing the power of vile entities, you transform yourself into a Large aberration.

name: Abyssal Plague
description: Your touch afflicts the target with Abyssal plague, which siphons fragments of their soul away to empower the Abyss.

name: Acid Storm
description: You evoke a storm of acid rain that pelts the area for the spell's duration.

name: Ancestral Winds
description: You call on the same energies that manifest ancestor storms, summoning wailing spirits to terrorize your foes.

name: Arcane Countermeasure
description: Trigger A creature within range that you can see Casts a Spell.You undermine the target spell, making it easier to defend against.

name: Aspirational State
source: Pathfinder Society Scenario #2-22: Breaking the Storm: Excising Ruination
description: The primary caster takes an ethereal form composed of the combined drive of every caster to exorcise a malevolent spirit.

name: Astral Projection
description: You project the targets' spiritual essences into the Astral Plane, leaving their inanimate physical forms behind.

name: Bandit's Doom
description: You ward the target item against those who would steal it.

name: Banishment
description: You send the target back to its home plane.

name: Belittling Boast
description: You boast about your skills or combat prowess, bolstering your own abilities and belittling your opponents.

name: Black Tentacles
description: Area 20-foot burst adjacent to a flat surfaceOily black tentacles rise up and attempt to capture creatures in the area.

name: Blackfinger's Blades
description: You pray for swift and painful death to your enemies and find your and your allies' weapons blessed to deliver just that.

name: Blazing Fissure
description: A thin crack rips through the earth, erupting with magma, then swiftly seals up.

name: Blessing of Defiance
description: Channeling forth the power to persevere in the face of adversity, you grant the target the means to deny danger and avoid dire harm.

name: Blind Eye
description: You enchant a single object, preventing it from being used for magical observation.

name: Blinding Foam
description: You spray a colorful, caustic foam into the target's eyes, which clings to their face.

name: Blink Charge
description: You propel yourself through the fabric of space to deal a blow carrying the momentum of your teleportation.

name: Blister
description: You point at a target in range, and its skin grows searing blisters filled with caustic fluid.

name: Blood Feast
