description: Your head splits vertically into an enormous maw, which feasts upon the target's blood, dealing 12d6 piercing damage, depending on your spell attack roll.

name: Boomerang Shot
description: You launch a curved length of wood at a foe that arcs around objects and obstacles to strike from an unexpected direction.

name: Bountiful Oasis
description: You redirect the flow of underground lakes and other nearby sources of water to cause a lush natural spring to emerge from the ground.

name: Breath of Life
description: Trigger A living creature within range would die.

name: Call Spirit
description: You tear the veil to the afterlife and call a spirit from its final resting place.

name: Celestial Brand
description: A blazing symbol appears on the target, cursing it to face divine justice.

name: Chameleon Coat
description: You shift the colors of the targets' outermost layer of clothing and gear to be closer to their environment when they remain still.

name: Chromatic Wall
description: You create an opaque wall of light in a single vibrant color.

name: Chthonian Wrath
description: You evoke the energy of a part of the Outer Rifts.

name: Cleansing Flames
description: You wrap the target in purifying flames.

name: Cloak of Colors
description: A cloak of swirling colors shrouds the target.

name: Cone of Cold
description: Icy cold rushes forth from your hands.

name: Confusing Cry
description: You give an unsettling, warbling cry that causes nearby creatures to lash out without control.

name: Construct Mindscape
description: You create an entirely mental environment called an immersive mindscape.

name: Consuming Darkness
description: Your shadow wriggles before spreading out from you, forming a gateway of clinging, consuming shadow through which the horrors of another plane can barely be seen.

name: Contagious Idea
description: Nothing is so contagious as a thought.

name: Control Water
description: By imposing your will upon the water, you can raise or lower the level of water in the chosen area by 10 feet.

name: Corrosive Muck
description: Area all squares in two 10-foot bursts.You create two puddles of acidic slime that hinders the movement of anyone who walks through them.

name: Curse of Death
description: Your patron wraps a hand around your target's heart.

name: Dance of Darkness
description: You dance, Striding up to half your Speed.

name: Dancing Blade
description: You telekinetically animate a weapon that's unattended or on your person.

name: Death Ward
description: You shield a creature from the ravages of void energy.

name: Desperate Repair
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Trigger A shield within range would be reduced to 0 Hit Points by a damaging effect Requirements The triggering shield had more than 1 Hit Point before taking damage.

name: Diadem of Divine Radiance
description: You don a diadem of radiant light, which sheds bright light to a range of 60 feet and dim light to a further 60 feet.

name: Divine Immolation
description: Divine flames scour creatures within the area.

name: Domora's Defense
description: Domora Hume is considered by most to be the first god caller, conjuring a god from the Plane of Water named Dyzad to protect his town from Mammoth Lord raiders.

name: Dragon Wings
description: Leathery wings sprout from your back, giving you a fly Speed of 60 feet or your Speed, whichever is faster.

name: Drain Planar Connection
description: You draw the planar energy from Idyllis, through the ley lines, and into the six latticework spheres.

name: Dread Ambience
description: In some places, it always feels like something is observing you, as if the very land doesn't want you there.

name: Dreaming Potential
description: You draw the target into a lucid dream where it can explore the endless possibilities of its own potential within the everchanging backdrop of its dreamscape.

name: Drop Dead
description: The target appears to fall down dead, though it actually turns .

name: Ectoplasmic Expulsion
description: You call upon tendrils of ephemeral ectoplasm to pass through the target and carry away a harmful psychic affliction.

name: Elemental Blast
description: Area @Template[burst|distance:10], @Template[cone|distance:30], or @Template[line|distance:60]You gather elemental energy and blast your foes in one of the various listed shapes of your choosing, dealing 8d6 damage.

name: Elemental Breath
description: You open a miniature portal to an elemental plane within your mouth, then exhale a powerful explosion of the plane's element.

name: Elemental Form
description: You call upon the power of the planes to transform into a Medium elemental battle form.

name: Elemental Servitor
description: You implore an elemental lord to send an elemental servitor of the lord's choice, with a level no greater than double the ritual's spell rank.

name: Engrave Memory
description: You store memories inside a stone.

name: Entreat Thunderbird
description: You entreat the thunderbird in the Tusk Mountains to come to your aid.

name: Entwined Roots
description: Slithering roots gird you and your allies in layers of flexible wooden protection.

name: Establish Nexus
description: You focus the power of the node's intersecting ley lines into a powerful confluent point known as a ley line nexus.

name: Establish Ward
description: You bind a part of your essence to your surroundings, creating a warded area that grants you power within it, but drains you outside of it.

name: Etheric Shards
description: You reach out and sow glittering splinters of force throughout the area, otherworldly caltrops of will and ectoplasm.

name: False Vision
description: You create a false image that fools any attempts to scry on an area.

name: Feast of Supplication
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: When mortals attempt to sway gods, spirits, and other beings of great spiritual power to take sides in mortal affairs, those powers demand to be impressed.

name: Fey Glamour
description: You call upon fey glamours to cloak an area or the targets in illusion.

name: Fire's Pathway
description: You step into a blazing fire that's big enough for you to fit inside and instantly teleport to any other fire within 5 miles that also has a sufficiently large size.

name: Flame Dancer
description: Fire encircles the target's hands and feet, and its eyes and hair catch ablaze.

name: Flame Strike
description: Area: 10-foot radius, 40-foot-tall cylinder You call a rain of divine fire that plummets down from above, dealing 8d6 fire damage.

name: Flames of Ego
description: Elegant flames of incredible beauty coruscate across the target's body, creating overconfidence and carelessness.

name: Flammable Fumes
description: Sending magic deep underground, you conjure a cloud of toxic gases that swiftly degenerate into volatile fumes.

name: Flowing Strike
description: A wave of flowing water rushes behind you like an elegant river, pushing you across the battlefield with fluid grace.

name: Forceful Hand
description: A Medium floating, disembodied hand made of magical force appears in an unoccupied space adjacent to you, following you across the battlefield to shield you against your foes' attacks.

name: Foresee the Path
description: You see just a split second into the future and glean how an enemy will move, making it easier for your allies to strike it mid-action.

name: Fortifying Brew
description: You craft a large quantity of restorative drink, such as an invigorating tea, a refreshing ale, or a stimulative alchemical tonic.

name: Freezing Rain
description: Intense cold rain comes from nowhere, a microcosm of a sudden downpour, and a magical tweak can turn the rain to freezing sleet.

name: Geyser
description: Area 10-foot radius, 50-foot-tall cylinder A powerful geyser blasts up from the ground, potentially pushing creatures on top of it into the air.

name: Glacial Heart
description: Ice and bone-deep cold assail the target, freezing it from the inside out.

name: Glimmer of Charm
description: You're bathed in a smooth, almost glittering aura that improves the attitude of those near you.

name: Gluttonous Growth
description: Plants in the area grow rapidly, taking on carnivorous characteristics as they seek to consume prey.

name: Grasping Grave
description: Hundreds of skeletal arms erupt from the ground in the area, clawing at creatures within and attempting to hold them in place.

name: Grisly Growths
description: This gruesome spell causes the target to grow excess limbs and organs, whether it be fingers multiplying until hands resemble bushes, eyes popping open in bizarre places, legs sprouting from the side of the body, or some other result.

name: Hallucination
description: The target consistently detects one thing as another, can't detect something that's there, or detects something that's not there, though it doesn't alter their beliefs.

name: Healing Well
description: You call forth a well of healing that you and your allies can draw from later.

name: Hellfire Plume
description: You call forth a plume of hellfire that erupts from below, dealing 4d6 fire damage and 4d6 spirit damage.Heightened (+1) The fire and spirit damage each increase by 1d6.

name: Hologram Cage
description: Area 1 cube 20 feet on each side You weave light into a cube of vivid and fantastic patterns.

name: House of Imaginary Walls
description: You mime an 10-foot-by-10-foot wall adjacent to you and within your reach.

name: Howling Blizzard
description: Freezing winds extend from your hands, pushing away from you with great force.

name: Hunter's Vision
description: Your target glows with a magical aura visible only to you and those who follow your lead.

name: Illusory Scene
description: You craft an imaginary scene that includes up to 10 discrete creatures or objects of various sizes, all of which must be within the spell's area.

name: Imaginary Lockbox
description: You turn a container and its contents into an imaginary form stored in your mind that only you can see and interact with.

name: Impaling Spike
description: You conjure a spike that thrusts up from the earth beneath a target creature, potentially impaling it.

name: Incarnate Ancestry
description: You attempt to reach back through time to make brief contact with one of the many past lives of the willing creature, then transform their current body to incarnate elements of that past life's ancestry into the present.

name: Incendiary Fog
description: You summon a cloud of flammable black dust.

name: Inevitable Disaster
description: You briefly glimpse cause and effect, putting into motion a chain of events that will visit doom on your enemy at some point in the future, though you're not quite sure when or how the doom will occur.

name: Infectious Comedy
description: You tell a magical joke and infect a target with laughter that spreads to those nearby.

name: Invoke Spirits
description: Ragged apparitions of the dead rise to stalk the living.

name: Lashunta's Life Bubble
description: You create a replenishing protective bubble of fresh, temperate air around the target.

name: Lightning Storm
description: You create a black, rumbling storm cloud and call down one lightning bolt within the spell's area.

name: Magic Passage
description: You create a visible tunnel through the wall in the chosen area, replacing the area with empty space.

name: Mantle of the Frozen Heart
description: You surround yourself in a mantle of frigid ice magic, and your skin and armor morph into cold blue ice.

name: Mantle of the Magma Heart
description: You surround yourself in a mantle of blazing fire magic, and your skin and anything you're wearing morphs into burning hot lava.

name: Mantle of the Melting Heart
description: You bathe yourself in a mantle of liquid metal, gilding your skin and armor with an oily sheen.

name: Mantle of the Unwavering Heart
description: Vines and branches envelop you in an instant, growing a wild bloom of colors that open to reveal your new form.

name: Mariner's Curse
description: You afflict the target with the curse of the roiling, unforgiving sea.

name: Mind Probe
description: You cast your thoughts through a creature's mind, sifting for information.

name: Mind Swap
description: This ritual allows two subjects to exchange minds, fully inhabiting one another's bodies.

name: Mirecloak
description: You wrap the targeted creatures in thin, sickly green shrouds that sap information from attackers.

name: Mirror Malefactors
description: You completely surround a Large or smaller creature in a shimmering ring of illusory mirrors that follows it as it moves, even when the creature moves outside the range of the spell.

name: Moon Frenzy
description: A feral aspect overcomes the targets, filling them with strength and ferocity.

name: Mosquito Blight
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth
description: You infest the area with tenacious, biting insects that disease and drain life from creatures in the area.

name: Mother's Blessing
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth
description: You attempt to purify and stabilize the life inside of Ulgrem-Axaan's last remaining clutch of eggs.

name: Nature's Pathway
description: You step into a living tree with a trunk big enough for you to fit inside it and instantly teleport to any tree within 5 miles that also has a sufficiently large trunk.

name: Oblivious Expulsion
description: Severing ties with a member of a cult courts danger and threatens to undermine the secrecy of the group, whether that secrecy protects its worshippers or enables them to operate in the shadows.

name: Ode to Ouroboros
description: Trigger A creature's dying condition would reach the value at which they would die.

name: Over the Coals
description: You accuse the target of breaking its word to you and invoke the wrath of your patron to claim what's due, demanding the target pay you in currency, fulfill an order, or stand down.

name: Pack Breaker
description: You can deceive creatures by changing their perception of their allies' behavior.

name: Pillars of Sand
source: Pathfinder #155: Lord of the Black Sands
description: You raise one or more pillars of solid sand from the earth.

name: Planar Servitor
description: You call upon a deity (or other divine power) to grant you aid in the form of a divine servitor of your deity's choice, with a level no greater than double the ritual's spell rank.

name: Plant Form
description: Taking inspiration from verdant creatures, you transform into a Large plant battle form.

name: Portrait of Spite
description: Using the blood, you compose a portrait of the target in perfect health.

name: Portrait of the Artist
description: You change your appearance to look like a well-known artist talented at a particular craft or performance, such as a painter, singer, or orator, with the effects of illusory disguise.

name: Pressure Zone
description: Air pressure drops precipitously, causing pain and debilitation in creatures' inner ears and joints.

name: Pulverizing Wake
description: Imitating raptorial creatures, you attack with such speed it drives a sonic shockwave.

name: Quicken Time
description: You speed up the time stream in an area, stretching and pulling it until time flows swift and wild.

name: Rallying Banner
description: You create an illusory banner representing a revolution, social movement, or organization such as the Firebrands.

name: Ravening Maw
description: You evoke Zevgavizeb's unceasing hunger and inflict it upon your target.

name: Redistribute Potential
description: Area two adjacent 5-foot squares Energy attempts to balance out, but with your magic, you can shunt all the energy in one area to another.

name: Repelling Pulse
description: You unleash a powerful pulse of telekinetic power, and the pulse violently hurls creatures away from you.

name: Restorative Moment
description: Your patron weaves the threads of time around the target, giving them some of the benefits of a day's passage.

name: Resurrect
description: You attempt to call forth the target's soul and return it to its body.

name: Return Beacon
description: You create a unique planar beacon somewhere within the spell's range that remains in place.

name: Rewinding Step
description: You anchor your location in time so that you can swiftly retrace your steps later with complex chronomancy.

name: Rewrite Possibility
description: You continually glimpse into the target's future and nudge fate to guide them toward the best possible outcome.

name: Rip the Spirit
description: You supernaturally rip the spirit from a living creature's body, dooming the target to pain and death.

name: Ritual Obstruction
description: You establish a zone of magical feedback that makes it impossible to succeed at rituals of this spell's rank or lower in the area.

name: Sawtooth Terrain
description: You cause long, serrated mantis limbs to appear, swiping at and obstructing creatures in the area.

name: Scouring Pulse
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Area 10-foot radius, 60-foot-tall cylinderYou inundate the area with concentrated vitality energy, which scours away the stain of undeath.

name: Scouting Eye
description: You create an , floating eye, 1 inch in diameter, at a location you can see within 500 feet.

name: Secret Chest
description: You banish a container and its contents to the Ethereal Plane, where you can retrieve it from later.

name: Sending
description: You send the creature a mental message of 25 words or fewer, and it can respond immediately with its own message of 25 words or fewer.

name: Shadow Blast
description: You shape the shadow substance of the Netherworld into a blast.

name: Shadow Jump
description: You instantly transport yourself from one shadow to another.

name: Shadow Siphon
description: Trigger A spell or magical effect deals damage.Exchanging material energy with that of the Shadow Plane, you transform the triggering spell into a partially illusory version of itself.

name: Shall not Falter, Shall not Rout
description: Calling out the fifth line of the Crimson Oath, you seal your most grievous injuries with a stroke of your blade.

name: Shepherd of Souls
description: You stay the hand of fate for one not yet destined to die, sacrificing some of your own vitality to heal them.

name: Slither
description: A mass of snakes made of shadow rise up to capture creatures in the area.

name: Soulshelter Vessel
description: You connect the spirit of the target creature with the target object, giving their spirit a durable vessel that protects and empowers their body.

name: Speak with Stones
description: You can ask questions of and receive answers from natural or worked stone.

name: Spectral Advance
description: Taking on a spiritual form, you flash across the battlefield to engage an enemy.

name: Spellmaster's Ward
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You create one or more glowing protective runes that revolve around you.

name: Spiritual Guardian
description: A Medium guardian made of magical force appears in an unoccupied space in range.

name: Spiritual Torrent
description: You release your spiritual essence in a torrential blast of energy, dealing 10d6 damage.

name: Stagnate Time
description: You examine the time stream in a particular area, then proceed to stick a few metaphorical pins into it, thickening and slowing down the flow of time until it rumbles along like a river of molasses.

name: Steal the Sky
description: Trigger You make a successful unarmed Strike against a flying creature.

name: Stormburst
description: Your voice projects like cracking thunder as you summon a localized storm, creating a fearsome surge of lightning and wind that deals 6d6 electricity damage.

name: Strange Geometry
description: Area 4 cubes, each 10 feet on a side You cause the areas to appear to swell, bend, and break, twisting together in a bizarre spatial geometry.

name: Subconscious Suggestion
description: You implant a subconscious suggestion deep within the target's mind for them to follow when a trigger you specify occurs.

name: Summerland Spell
description: The Summerland Spell is an extension of a unique ritual developed by Brogan the Grasswalker.

name: Summon Anarch
description: You conjure a chaotic celestial, monitor, or fiend to fight on your behalf.

name: Summon Axiom
description: You conjure a lawful celestial, monitor, or fiend to fight on your behalf.

name: Summon Celestial
description: You summon a creature that has the celestial trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

name: Summon Dragon
description: You summon a creature that has the dragon trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

name: Summon Entity
description: You summon a creature that has the aberration trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

name: Summon Fiend
description: You summon a creature that has the fiend trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

name: Summon Giant
description: You summon a creature that has the giant trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

name: Summon Healing Servitor
description: You call forth a servitor forged from raw vitality energy to heal and bolster your allies.

name: Summon Monitor
description: You summon a creature that has the monitor trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

name: Symphony of the Unfettered Heart
description: Your symphony lifts listeners from their worldly concerns.

name: Synaptic Pulse
description: You emit a pulsating mental blast that penetrates the minds of all enemies in the area.

name: Synesthesia
description: The target's senses are suddenly rewired in unexpected ways, causing them to process noises as bursts of color, smells as sounds, and so on.

name: Telekinetic Haul
description: You move the target up to 20 feet, potentially suspending it in midair.

name: Telepathic Bond
description: The targets can communicate telepathically with any or all of the other targets from any point on the same planet.

name: Temporary Glyph
description: Area 5-foot square You temporarily bind a hostile spell into a symbol.

name: Terrain Transposition
description: You mystically transpose your current location with another.

name: Tesseract Tunnel
description: You race from point to point, tearing open a tunnel in space.

name: The World's a Stage
description: This famous ritual is a sophisticated example of symbolic magic, binding fate and fortune to follow a prepared script.

name: Toxic Cloud
description: You conjure a poisonous fog.

name: Transmute Rock And Mud
description: Area 2 adjacent 10-foot cubes You warp the structure of earthen material, turning rock into mud or mud into rock.

name: Truespeech
description: The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures.

name: Umbral Journey
description: You move partially into the Netherworld, using its warped nature to speed your travels.

name: Unblinking Flame Aura
description: You focus your sight inside and call on your inner fire to grant you warmth, steady your vision, and soothe your body.

name: Unbreaking Wave Vapor
description: Trigger You're targeted by an attack made by an attacker you can see.

name: Unfolding Wind Buffet
description: You surround your unarmed attacks with the speed and force of air.

name: Untwisting Iron Roots
description: You manipulate the earth beneath your feet to throw your enemies off balance, leaving chunks of rock and rubble behind.

name: Unusual Anatomy
description: You transform your flesh and organs into a bizarre amalgam of glistening skin, rough scales, tufts of hair, and tumorous protuberances.

name: Vindicator's Judgment
description: You pronounce a terrible judgment upon your quarry that causes all of your attacks and divine spells to strike with deadly efficacy.

name: Wall of Flesh
description: You craft a 20-foot-tall wall of living flesh in a straight line up to 30 feet long.

name: Wall of Ice
description: You sculpt an ice barrier that blocks sight and, once shattered, freezes foes.

name: Wall of Stone
description: You shape a wall of solid stone.

name: Waters of Prediction
source: Pathfinder Blog: The Waters of Stone Ring Pond
description: You and the secondary casters peer into the still waters of a natural pool or lake to divine your collective future.

name: Wave of Despair
description: You inflict despair on creatures in the area.

name: Wind Jump
description: You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

name: Wisdom of the Winds
description: You ask a question of the spirits of air, imploring them to send signals through the winds to help you find your way.

name: Wish-Twisted Form
description: You focus your magic upon an enemy, wishing for their defenses to fail and turning their strengths into weaknesses.

name: World in Shadow
description: This ritual must be cast at night, at which point darkness becomes everlasting.

name: Wronged Monk's Wrath
description: You unleash your ki as a powerful storm of force and lightning, dealing 2d6 force damage and 2d12 electricity damage to creatures in the area.

name: Wyvern Sting
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven
description: You duplicate the venomous sting of a wyvern.

name: You're Mine
description: You manipulate the target's emotions, potentially allowing you to control it for a brief instant.

name: Accelerated Decomposition
description: You speed the natural process of a creature's decline and debilitation.

name: Ancestral Form
description: You take the form of your ancestral spirits, becoming and quasi-corporeal.

name: Arrow Salvo
description: You conjure an immense wooden bow that launches a salvo of massive arrows at all nearby enemies.

name: Ash Form
description: You take the form of a cloud of minuscule ash particles.

name: Asmodean Wager
description: You facilitate a magically binding agreement between yourself and one or more additional secondary casters, wherein each participant (hereafter referred to as the bettors) stakes something of value on the outcome of an event that has yet to be determined.

name: Aura of the Unremarkable
description: You and allies in the area appear to be completely innocuous to other creatures within the spell's area, regardless of the actions you're committing.

name: Awaken Animal
description: You grant intelligence to the target, transforming it into a beast.

name: Awaken Entropy
description: All things age, all things die, and at the end of days even the universe will grow quiet and still.

name: Awaken Object
description: You imbue a single Small or smaller object with rudimentary awareness and consciousness, and it gains mental ability modifiers depending on the results of the ritual.

name: Bacchanalia
description: You hold an elaborate feast and stoke the celebratory spirit, causing it to spread to other people nearby; you buoy them with hope and good cheer as they revel into the night.

name: Binding Circle
description: You call forth an extraplanar creature of a level no greater than double that of the binding circle ritual's rank and attempt to bargain with it, generally to perform a task for you in exchange for payment.

name: Blade Barrier
description: Blades of force form a churning wall.

name: Blanket of Stars
description: A flowing cloak of utter darkness drapes over you, filled with pinpricks of light like distant stars.

name: Blessed Boundary
description: Manifestations of divine force appear in the hundreds, swirling in a massive, protective sphere.

name: Blinding Fury
description: Trigger A creature damages you.You curse the target with your outrage at being attacked.

name: Bound in Death
description: You tether another creature's spirit to your own, shunting part of the damage dealt to you onto one of your foes.

name: Bounty of the Sky
description: You call forth a flock of geese that drop restorative fruits and breads from the sky as they fly overhead.

name: Cast into Time
description: You release a wave of temporal energy that sends creatures violently tumbling through time, scarring their thoughts with the information flowing around them.

name: Catch Your Name
description: Trigger A creature on your plane speaks your private or true name Requirements You know your own true name.

name: Chain Lightning
description: You discharge a powerful bolt of lightning at the target, dealing 8d12 electricity damage.

name: Champion's Sacrifice
description: Trigger An ally is hit by a Strike, or an ally fails a saving throw against an effect that doesn't affect you.You form a link with an ally, allowing you to take harm in their stead.

name: Chromatic Image
description: You call forth three illusory images of yourself, and each of the four of you takes on a different color, your colors all shifting each time someone attacks you.

name: Claim Undead
description: You attempt to wrest control of a target undead or force it to recognize you as its master.

name: Collective Transposition
description: You teleport the targets to new positions within the area.

name: Commune
description: You call upon an unknown, powerful being to answer questions.

name: Create Skinstitch
description: You transform the target into a skinstitch, a hideous construct covered in the flesh of sentient humanoids.

name: Crimson Breath
description: You turn a creature toward you and exhale a blast of crimson mist from your mouth, exposing the target to a toxic miasma.

name: Cursed Metamorphosis
description: You transform the target creature into a harmless animal appropriate to the area, with effects based on its Fortitude save.

name: Daemon Form
description: You infuse yourself with the corrupting death and pure malevolence of Abaddon, transforming into a Large daemon battle form.

name: Demon Form
description: You corrupt yourself with the sin of the Outer Rifts, transforming into a Medium demon battle form.

name: Devil Form
description: You bind yourself to the power of Hell, transforming into a Medium devil battle form.

name: Disintegrate
description: A black tracer bolt flies toward your target, and upon making contact intensifies into a powerful destructive beam.

name: Dominate
description: You take command of the target, forcing it to obey your orders.

name: Dragon Form
description: Calling upon powerful magic, you gain a Large dragon battle form.

name: Dread Secret
description: You utter a powerful secret at odds with the fundamental nature of the target creatures.

name: Elemental Confluence
description: You conjure four types of elementals who combine forces to form into a chaotic storm.

name: Entreat the Many
description: You manifest echoes of all the spirits you've ever bonded with at once, in a spiraling cyclone of colorful forms.

name: Fateful Condemnation
description: You draw upon the target's negative fate to afflict it and its nearby allies with the unintended consequences of its past lives.

name: Field of Life
description: A field of life energy fills the area, exuding warmth and rejuvenating those within.

name: Field of Razors
description: You grind a chunk of your choice of metal to fine dust between your hands and blow it into the air, where it grows into a tangle of wires covered in razor-sharp prongs.

name: Fire Seeds
description: Four acorns grow in your hand, their shells streaked with pulsing red and orange patterns.

name: Flame Vortex
description: Area 5-foot radius, 40-foot tall cylinder You combine a blazing inferno and air currents into a fiery vortex.

name: Flaming Fusillade
description: You call upon an endless barrage of flames, a series of explosions bursting around you like miniature suns.

name: For Love, For Lightning
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: When you Cast the Spell, you plunge the required weapon into the ground, where it crackles with crimson lightning.

name: Form of the Sandpoint Devil
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth
description: You infuse yourself with incredible amounts of pure evil, subsuming your consciousness into malevolence and giving yourself a monstrous form resembling that of the Sandpoint Devil.

name: Frost Pillar
description: Ice crystallizes around a creature, imprisoning it within an icy pillar.

name: Gray Shadow
description: You pray over a dying creature, drawing its shadow into your service as long as its owner is stooped at death's door.

name: Hag's Fruit
description: You imbue a single piece of fruit with a curse that leaves its victims in a magical sleep.

name: Halcyon Infusion
description: You infuse magical energy into your target, opening up their mind to the pathways of magic and granting them the ability to use magic to affect the world around them.

name: Heinous Future
description: You hold up a fractured mirror to the target, and in that mirror it sees a thing that may yet come to pass—a ghastly foretelling that the target instinctively knows is eerily possible.

name: Heroic Feat
description: You gain the ability to perform a specialized combat technique from the vast wealth of martial knowledge your mystery provides.

name: Ideal Mimicry
description: You craft a doll with care and quiet meditation on the target, inserting the fingernails into the body, tying the lock of hair around the neck of the doll, or emptying the vial of blood into the stuffing and allowing it to be absorbed.

name: Kaiju Ward
description: You protect a physical structure from the devastation caused by immense creatures.

name: Life-Giving Form
description: You transcend your physical form, becoming a beacon of healing energy.

name: Lignify
description: You turn the target's flesh slowly into wood.

name: Lure Dream
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth
description: You reach out to the dream realm, beckoning an animate dream to your side.

name: Manifold Lives
description: You cast a creature's mind back through time, forcing them to take other paths and make other choices, experiencing countless alternate lives in an instant.

name: Mantle of Heaven's Slopes
description: You surround yourself in a mantle of heavenly power, invoking the power of the layers of the celestial mountain above.

name: Mislead
description: You turn yourself and create an illusory duplicate of yourself.

name: Missed Cue
description: You make the spell's target believe they had something incredibly important to say but forgot to say it, and now they've missed their opportunity.

name: Moonlight Bridge
description: You summon a bridge of radiant, shimmering moonlight.

name: Nature's Reprisal
description: The plant life within the area begins to writhe and lash out against your enemies as you call upon nature to impede your foes.

name: Necrotize
description: You necrotize part of a creature's body, harming it and debilitating it as its body putrefies, mimicking the natural process of decay.

name: Never Mind
description: You drastically reduce the target's mental faculties.

name: Personal Ocean
description: You surround yourself in a bubble-like shroud of seawater that fills your space completely and moves with you.

name: Petrify
description: The target's body slowly turns into a stone statue.

name: Phantasmal Calamity
description: A vision of apocalyptic destruction fills the mind of each creature in the area.

name: Phantom Orchestra
description: You orchestrate an invisible ensemble of lost sounds captured inside errant breezes across the Plane of Air, and you can direct this symphony to attack foes within range.

name: Poltergeist's Fury
description: Your fury spills over in a telekinetic storm of terrifying proportions.

name: Primal Call
description: This functions as except you craft a faerie circle and call an animal, beast, fey, fungus, or plant from within 100 miles.

name: Primal Summons
description: You enhance a summoned creature with the power of the elements.

name: Purple Worm Sting
description: You replicate the attack of a deadly purple worm.

name: Raise Dead
description: You attempt to call forth the dead creature's soul, requiring the creature's body to be present and relatively intact.

name: Ravenous Darkness
description: You create a shroud of magical darkness that feeds on those inside it.

name: Repulsion
description: You manifest an aura that prevents creatures from approaching you.

name: Revel in Retribution
description: Time seems to slow for you, allowing you to strike your opponents mid-move.

name: Rose's Thorns
description: Rose bushes with razor-sharp thorns sprout from the ground in the area.

name: Sacred Form
description: You focus all your divine energy and transform yourself into a battle form, similar to your normal form and of the same size as you, but wielding powerful divine armaments.

name: Scintillating Safeguard
description: Trigger An effect would deal physical or energy damage to you or a creature in range.A sparkling magical barrier envelops each target, shielding them against the triggering effect.

name: Scrying
description: You magically spy on a creature of your choice.

name: Seize Identity
description: With a gleeful cackle, you seize an individual's voice and swallow it.

name: Shadow Illusion
description: You create a shadowy illusion of a creature or a stationary object, but the illusion can exist only in an area of dim light or darkness.

name: Shambling Horror
description: You reanimate the corpse of a fallen creature as an undead minion under your control.

name: Sky Signs
description: You emblazon a message across the sky itself.

name: Song of Silver
description: The majority of the Song of Silver's time needed to Cast it consists of preparations for the performance, which must take place on a stage in Kintargo.

name: Speaking Sky
description: The air speaks to you.

name: Spellsurge
description: Magic surges to life around you, feeding on the raw power you radiate.

name: Spellwrack
description: You cause any spells cast on the target to spill out their energy in harmful surges.

name: Spirit Blast
description: You concentrate ethereal energy and attack a creature's spirit, dealing 16d6 spirit damage with a basic Fortitude save.

name: Statuette
description: This ritual is a variant of the shrink item spell that allows for the transformation of significantly larger items.

name: Stone to Flesh
description: Manipulating the fundamental particles of matter, you convert stone into flesh and blood.

name: Suffocate
description: You forcefully and cruelly draw the living breath from a creature's lungs, dealing 4d8 bludgeoning damage.

name: Suspended Retribution
description: All life dances one step from the precipice, one heartbeat from disaster.

name: Tanglecurse
source: Pathfinder #211: The Secret of Deathstalk Tower
description: Tanglebriar has been called a "curse on the land," which has inspired Treerazer's cult to develop this notorious spell.

name: Tangling Creepers
description: Dense, twitching creepers sprout from every surface and fill any bodies of water in the area.

name: Teleport
description: You and the targets are instantly transported to any location within range, as long as you can identify the location precisely both by its position relative to your starting position and by its appearance (or other identifying features).

name: Tempest Form
description: Your body becomes fluid to better suit your surroundings.

name: Temporal Ward
source: Pathfinder #173: Doorway to the Red Star
description: You ward a target doorway or container with a temporal trap that rewinds the personal timeline of creatures trying to open it.

name: Terminate Bloodline
source: Pathfinder #155: Lord of the Black Sands
description: Mighty drow noble houses, including House Shraen, use this ritual to stamp out fledgling noble houses before they rise to power.

name: The Unseeing Blade Master
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia World Guide
description: There are many legends of blade masters who, not wanting to rely on flawed mortal eyes, learned to fight through reliance on both their other keen senses and knowledge from the universe itself.

name: Tree of Seasons
description: You cause a Small tree to instantly sprout in an unoccupied space on the ground.

name: Truesight
description: You see things within 60 feet as they actually are.

name: Unexpected Transposition
description: Trigger You are targeted with an enemy's Strike.

name: Utter Destruction
description: You screech with an unearthly voice made of destructive energy, smashing everything that lies before you.

name: Vampiric Exsanguination
description: You draw in the blood and life force of other creatures through your outstretched arms.

name: Vibrant Pattern
description: You create a pattern of lights that pulses with intensity.

name: Vitrifying Blast
description: You launch a cone of glass shards, which embed in creatures to turn them partially to glass.

name: Wall of Force
description: You form an wall of pure magical force up to 50 feet long and up to 20 feet high.

name: Wall of Metal
description: You call forth a sheet of metal, forming a wall of iron, low-grade cold iron, or standard-grade silver up to 60 feet long, 30 feet high, and 1/4 inch thick.

name: Ward Domain
description: Area 100 feet × 100 feet, up to 50 feet high.This ritual has long been used to guard the private sanctums of powerful rulers, spellcasters, and other figures of import.

name: Word of Revision
description: Trigger A creature within range fails or critically fails a saving throw or is reduced to 0 Hit Points As all good writers know, you shouldn't kill off your protagonist before their story is complete.

name: Zealous Conviction
description: You bypass your targets' rational minds, instilling them with unshakable conviction and zeal.

name: Zero Gravity
description: Area 20-foot radius, 40-foot-tall cylinder You negate gravity's effects in the area.

name: Allegro
description: You perform rapidly, speeding up your ally.

name: Angel Form
description: Invoking the celestial realms, you transform into a Medium angel battle form.

name: Beheading Buzz Saw
description: You compress molten scraps pulled from the Plane of Metal into a spinning disc with gruesome blades protruding from its edges.

name: Blightburn Blast
source: Pathfinder #155: Lord of the Black Sands
description: You channel a blast of powerful blightburn radiation from your hands.

name: Chrysopoetic Curse
description: You grant the target the gift of riches, giving them the power to turn anything they touch to gold.

name: City of Sin
description: Area 7-mile-radius circle centered on youEach day during the casting of this ritual, intelligent creatures within range become increasingly prone to shed their inhibitions and give in to whatever tempts them.

name: Collective Memories
description: You tap into other mortals' memories, knowledge, legends, tales, and lore about a subject.

name: Contingency
description: You prepare a spell that will trigger later.

name: Control Sand
source: Pathfinder #155: Lord of the Black Sands
description: You whip up a small sandstorm around your body.

name: Corrosive Body
description: You exhale corrosive gas, and acidic secretions coat your skin as you transform into a being of living acid.

name: Cosmic Form
description: You recreate your form entirely out of cosmic energy, transforming into a Large battle form.

name: Curse of the Spirit Orchestra
description: You summon an , insubstantial group of extraplanar musicians who follow the target and play distracting music to hinder its actions.

name: Dancing Fountain
description: Area 30-foot burst centered on you Tapping the ground, you create a shallow pool of water that spreads over the affected area, and majestic sprays, jets, and mists of water erupt forth in a dazzling water show.

name: Darklight
description: Shadows pour forth from your eyes, creating a field of darkness that prevents light from emanating within the area.

name: Deity's Strike
description: A manifested version of your deity's favored weapon appears in the air above and attacks the target, using your spell attack roll.

name: Devouring Void
description: Countless tears in space appear in the area, like hungry mouths.

name: Divine Decree
description: You utter a potent litany from your faith, a mandate that harms those who oppose your ideals.

name: Divine Vessel
description: You accept otherworldly energies into your body; while you are still recognizably yourself, you gain the features of one of your deity's servitors.

name: Duplicate Foe
description: You create a temporary duplicate of an enemy to fight on your behalf.

name: Eclipse Burst
description: A globe of freezing darkness explodes in the area, dealing 8d10 cold damage to creatures in the area, plus an additional 8d4 void damage to living creatures.

name: Empower Ley Line
description: You draw upon surrounding magical energy to empower a ley line, enhancing both its positive and negative effects.

name: Energy Aegis
description: You protect the target with a powerful, long-lasting energy barrier.

name: Entrancing Eyes
description: Your eyes glow with an entrancing radiance that captivates those who meet your gaze.

name: Ethereal Jaunt
description: You travel to the Ethereal Plane, which overlaps the Material Plane.

name: Execute
description: You point at a creature and invoke the demise of all things.

name: Fiery Body
description: You become living flame, giving you fire immunity, resistance 10 to precision damage, and weakness 5 to cold and to water.

name: Final Fate of the Locust Host
description: You conjure the rotting corpse of Deskari, previously Lord of the Locust Hosts, to the battlefield.

name: Frigid Flurry
description: You place a palm to your lips and exhale a cold breath, whipping up a gust of wind that freezes the air's ambient moisture into a flurry of jagged shards.

name: Gathering Call
description: You bind yourself and your allies to the specific safe location, referred to as a sanctuary, where you perform the ritual.

name: Hasted Assault
description: You call upon your magic to speed up your attacks.

name: Heaving Earth
description: You strike the ground, and unleash a wave that travels through the struck surface to the target.

name: Hungry Depths
description: A spiral of dark, corrupted water appears in the ground, plunging open a door to the depths that seems to descend for miles.

name: Indolent Haze
description: The faint scent of poppies and a soothing calm fill the area, urging creatures to lay down and take a rest, to do nothing at all, ever again.

name: Inexhaustible Cynicism
description: You inflict your targets with a crushing doubt about everyone and everything around them.

name: Interplanar Teleport
description: Requirements You have a planar key for the destination plane, used as a locus You and your allies traverse the barriers between planes of existence.

name: Leng Sting
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven
description: You use the power of nightmares to magically replicate the venomous attack of the aberrant and cunning Leng spiders.

name: Lifewood Cage
description: You create an immobile, prison of hardened wood suffused with vital energy from the Forge of Creation.

name: Love's Sacrifice
description: You cry out for aid, and a creature near you feels compelled to throw itself in front of the threat as the ultimate expression of their love.

name: Mask of Terror
description: The target appears to be a gruesome and terrifying creature.

name: Maze of Locked Doors
description: The target of your spell is drawn into a long, twisting, extradimensional hallway blocked at 30-foot intervals with high-grade duskwood doors (Hardness 20, HP 80, BT 40, @Check[athletics|dc:30|name:Force Open Duskwood Door|traits:action:force-open] to Force Open) secured with (@Check[thievery|dc:25|

name: Momentary Recovery
description: You instantly teleport yourself and any items you're wearing or holding from your current space to a clear space within range that you can see.

name: Moonburst
description: A powerful globe of chilling moonlight explodes in the area, dealing 8d10 cold damage to all creatures in the area, plus an additional @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d10[vitality]] damage to undead creatures.

name: Planar Displacement
description: You draw a ritual circle, and when the ritual is complete, you shift all creatures in the area to a different plane of existence.

name: Planar Palace
description: You grow an extradimensional demiplane consisting of a spacious dwelling with a single entrance.

name: Planar Seal
description: You create a visible magical barrier that attempts to counteract teleportation effects and planar travel into or out of the area, including items that allow access to extradimensional spaces.

name: Pollen Pods
description: Area four unoccupied 5-foot squares, each of which is at least 20 feet apart You cultivate four wooden bulbs, each filled with toxic pollen and sensitive to motion.

name: Possession
description: You send your mind and soul into the target's body, attempting to take control.

name: Power Word Blind
description: You utter an arcane word of power that can make the target upon hearing it.

name: Prismatic Armor
description: You wrap the target in armor made of multicolored light.

name: Prismatic Spray
description: A spray of rainbow light beams cascades from your open hand.

name: Project Image
description: You project an illusory image of yourself.

name: Ravenous Reanimation
description: You destroy the gathered treasures with your breath weapon or other powerful magic, then invoke necromantic energies before you feed upon the charred and melted remains.

name: Ray of Corruption
source: Pathfinder #211: The Secret of Deathstalk Tower
description: You unleash a sickly gray beam of toxic spores at your target.

name: Recall Legacy
description: You establish a mental link with the target, focusing on a piece of knowledge important to their culture, family (by birth or choice), or home settlement.

name: Regenerate
description: An infusion of vital energy grants a creature continuous healing.

name: Restore Ground
description: You sense that this place yearns to throw off the shackles of civilization.

name: Retrocognition
description: Opening your mind to mental echoes, you gain impressions from past events that occurred in your current location.

name: Return To Essence
source: Pathfinder #173: Doorway to the Red Star
description: You unravel the magic of a spell that affects a container, door, or lock, converting it into energy you can repurpose to power your own spells.

name: Reverse Gravity
description: Area (continued) 20-foot radius, 40-foot tall cylinderYou reverse gravity in the area.

name: Shadow Raid
description: You spin illusions of flying shadows throughout the area.

name: Shadow's Web
description: Grasping darkness surges from you, dealing 14d4 void damage.

name: Shock to the System
description: A dense lightning cloud descends to fill the target's space, then fires a jolt of revitalizing lightning into the target.

name: Soothing Ballad
description: You draw upon your muse to soothe your allies.

name: Spell Riposte
description: Trigger You're the target of a spell you're aware of.You attempt to counteract the triggering spell.

name: Spell Turning
description: This abjuration reflects spells cast at you back at their caster.

name: Summon Stampede
description: You summon an unstoppable stampede of panicking beasts.

name: Sunburst
description: A powerful globe of searing sunlight explodes in the area, dealing 8d10 fire damage to all creatures in the area, plus an additional @Damage[(@item.level+1)d10[vitality]] damage to undead creatures.

name: Supreme Connection
description: In a show of power, you call forth a powerful entity in front of a crowd of onlookers, forcing the entity to manifest and answer your questions.

name: Telekinetic Bombardment
description: You grasp a piece of the landscape-such as a tree, carriage, or piece of masonry-and lob it in your foe's direction.

name: Teleportation Circle
description: You create a 10-foot-diameter circle on the ground, which acts as a portal to a destination determined at the time of the ritual.

name: Tempest of Shades
description: You channel the forces of undeath to briefly call forth an amalgam of the vengeful dead slain by your enemies and allies alike.

name: Time Beacon
description: You create a beacon in time to return to it if things go wrong.

name: True Target
description: You delve into the possible futures of the next few seconds to understand all the ways your foe might avoid harm, then cast out a vision of that future to those around you.

name: Unbearable Cacophony
description: You amplify the sound of every item and creature to impossible levels.

name: Unblinking Flame Emblem
description: Trigger Your last action was a successful Strike against an enemy You emblazon the target with a fiery sigil that projects your sight and your flame onto them, allowing you and your allies to track their movements and making it easier to hit them.

name: Unbreaking Wave Barrier
description: You create a protective circle around yourself that repels your foes.

name: Unfettered Pack
description: You free those who travel alongside you from environmental hindrances.

name: Unfolding Wind Blitz
description: You blitz forward so quickly that you soar through the air, and nothing can react to you.

name: Untwisting Iron Augmentation
description: Your unarmed attacks are treated as cold iron and silver, they gain the earth trait, and they gain a +1 status bonus to damage rolls per damage die.

name: Vacuum
description: You inhale all air in the surrounding area, stealing the breath of nearby creatures.

name: Vibrant Vibrato
description: Your voice trills in perfect vibrato.

name: Visions of Danger
description: An illusion of horrific creatures fills the spell's area.

name: Volcanic Eruption
description: Area 5-foot radius, 80-foot-tall cylinder The ground opens up, spraying a column of lava high into the air in a vertical cylinder, dealing 14d6 fire damage to creatures in the area.

name: Warp Mind
description: You scramble a creature's mental faculties and sensory input.

name: All is One, One is All
description: You meld the targets' matter and life force into one and then, in an instant, sift them back out into their component selves.

name: Antimagic Field
description: You repel all magic from the target area, preventing spells and other magic from functioning.

name: Arctic Rift
description: A jagged crack opens in the air, dealing 12d8 cold damage as it draws away warmth.

name: Awaken Curse
description: You siphon a tiny portion of life force from each of the ritual's casters to empower a curse against disrupting effects.

name: Bathe in Blood
description: This is an old ritual, illegal in nearly every corner of Golarion, but never quite exterminated.

name: Boil Blood
description: You heat a foe's blood and boil it within its veins.

name: Burning Blossoms
description: Area 30-foot radius, 100-foot tall cylinder An intangible hollow tree sprouts from the ground and grows to towering height, radiating a fiery passion and fascinating viewers.

name: Canticle of Everlasting Grief
description: You create a melody distilled from pure grief, conveying the inevitable loss of everything your target cherishes, audible to only them.

name: Clone Companion
description: You create a duplicate of your companion, and the duplicate fights alongside its twin, mirroring the original's actions.

name: Confusing Colors
description: A cloud of cascading, ever-changing colors manifests in the air.

name: Control Weather
description: Area 2-mile-radius circle centered on you You alter the weather, making it calm and normal for the season or choosing up to two effects based on the season.

name: Create Demiplane
description: Few incantations are as renowned as the power to create worlds.

name: Deluge
description: You unleash a catastrophic downpour in the area that vanishes an instant later.

name: Desiccate
description: You pull the moisture from the targets' bodies, dealing 10d10 void damage.

name: Devour Life
description: You attempt to utterly consume the target's life force.

name: Disappearance
description: You shroud a creature from others' senses.

name: Divine Armageddon
description: You call forth a divine cataclysm from your deity, destroying living and undead creatures in the area alike.

name: Divine Aura
description: Divine power wards the targets, granting each a +1 status bonus to AC and saves while in the area.

name: Divine Inspiration
description: You infuse a target with spiritual energy, refreshing its magic.

name: Dream Council
description: When you Cast this Spell, any targets-including you-can choose to immediately fall asleep.

name: Earthquake
description: You shake the ground, topple creatures into fissures, and collapse structures.

name: Embodied Font
description: You place the magic items into a neat pile and attempt to draw out their power to form a new body that the target can inhabit.Critical Success The target materializes within range, with full Hit Points, 1 Mythic Point, and as if having just completed daily preparations.

name: Falling Sky
description: Extraordinary telekinetic pressure smashes down through the area, battering creatures within it to the ground.

name: Ferrous Form
description: Your body transforms entirely into flexible iron.

name: Freedom
description: You perform a ritual to free a creature imprisoned, petrified, or otherwise put into stasis by any magical effects.

name: Hidden Mind
description: Powerful wards hide a creature from magic that would spy on it or affect its mind.

name: Hypnopompic Terrors
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth
description: You send a wave of nightmarish visions crashing over your targets, leaving them paralyzed by fear.

name: Impaling Briars
description: The ground within the area transforms into a mass of dangerous briars that assault and impede your foes.

name: Imprisonment
description: You perform a ritual to imprison a creature in one of several forms.

name: Medusa's Wrath
description: You make an attack filled with a medusa's petrifying power.

name: Migration
description: The targets naturally take on animal forms most fitting their movement and environment.

name: Mimic Spell
description: Trigger A creature you're aware of within range Casts a Spell of the same tradition as mimic spell and of the same or lower rank.You learn the secrets of a spell just by watching someone else cast it.

name: Moment of Renewal
description: The targets experience a day's worth of recovery in an instant.

name: Monstrosity Form
description: You transform into the shape of a legendary monster, assuming a Huge battle form.

name: Musical Shift
description: With a quick series of wrist flicks, music fills the air.

name: Part the Mists to Paradise
description: You conjure a pathway to paradise, visible only to you and your allies through a dense cloud of magical mist.

name: Pinpoint
description: You learn the name of the target's exact location (including the building, community, and country) and plane of existence.

name: Polar Ray
description: You fire a blue-white ray of freezing air and sleet that deals 10d8 cold damage.

name: Power Word Stun
description: You stun the target with an arcane word of power.

name: Prismatic Wall
description: You create an opaque wall of shimmering, multicolored light.

name: Prying Survey
description: You create eight invisible, floating eyes, each about 3 inches in diameter, that scan the area around you, transmitting rough impressions of the environment.

name: Punishing Winds
description: Area (continued) 30-foot-radius, 100-foot-tall cylinderViolent winds and a powerful downdraft fill the area, forming a cyclone.

name: Quandary
description: You transport the target into an extraplanar puzzle room of mysterious origin, locking them there.

name: Rainbow Fumarole
description: Area 20-foot radius, 60-foot-tall cylinderMulti-hued flames break through cracks in the ground, reaching high into the sky and giving off dangerous fumes.

name: Rite of the Red Star
source: Pathfinder #173: Doorway to the Red Star
description: You invoke the latent power within the Doorway to the Red Star through repetitive chanting and ritual movements in an attempt to open a portal to the planet Akiton.

name: Spirit Song
description: Your eldritch song sends pulsing waves of ethereal energy to attack creatures' spirits in the area, dealing 14d6 spirit damage that causes their bodies to momentarily freeze up from the hypnotic nature of the tune, depending on the result of their Fortitude save.

name: Spiritual Epidemic
description: You curse the target, sapping its spirit and leaving a contagious trap in its essence.

name: Split Shadow
description: You create a shadow double of the target by drawing energy directly from the Shadow Plane into a mirror and shaping it into an exact, quasi-real duplicate.

name: Summon Archmage
description: You briefly call forth the spirit of a legendary wizard from ages long past, which manifests as an immense humanoid figure (typically an elf or a human).

name: Summon Deific Herald
description: Your faith is strong enough to briefly summon a direct representative of your deity, such as the deity's herald.

name: Summon Elemental Herald
description: Your meditation into the different elemental planes connects you to them deeply, and this connection allows you to summon a herald of an elemental lord.

name: Summon Irii
description: You cast your spell, whisper your words of power, and find that an irii is already here-indeed, they have always been here, and always were, and always will be.

name: Summon Warden of the Wild
description: You briefly call forth the spirit of one of the Wardens of the Wild, the legendary guardians of nature.

name: Take Your Places
description: The scene would play out exactly as you envisioned it, if only the actors would respect their blocking.

name: Touch of Death
description: Make a melee unarmed Strike.

name: Uncontrollable Dance
description: The target is overcome with an all-consuming urge to dance.

name: Undermine Reality
description: You lash a target with tendrils of shadow that steal some of its substance, making it quasi-real.

name: Unfettered Mark
source: Pathfinder #161: Belly of the Black Whale
description: You tattoo the target with rare inks and create a magical tattoo called an unfettered mark.

name: Unrelenting Observation
description: This spell grants perfect sight based on scrying, allowing several willing targets to track the exact movements or position of one creature or object.

name: Whirlpool
description: Area 25-foot radius, 20-foot tall cylinder With a spin of your hand, you create a large swirling vortex of storming waves.

name: Whirlwind
description: Area (continued) 15-foot radius, 80-foot-tall cylinderPowerful winds coalesce into a devastating tornado.

name: Arcane Explosion
description: Your body is temporarily converted into a ball of pure magic, rapidly exploding outward and reforming as a glowing sphere, after which you eventually regain your normal form.

name: Astral Labyrinth
description: You connect the entire area with an invisible maze of astral energy that interferes with dimensional and mental magic.

name: Beseech Arcanotheign
description: With a whispered prayer or arcane sending, you conjure Arcanotheign, herald of Nethys.

name: Bilocation
description: You exist in two places at once.

name: Blunt the Final Blade
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death
description: You anoint the with powdered dawnsilver and grave dirt while speaking softly and carefully to the souls trapped within it.

name: Call Fluxwraith
description: You break a mirror and cast the shards into the air.

name: Clone
description: You collect hair, nail clippings, and samples of skin and blood from the target, who must be present throughout the ritual and can be one of the casters.

name: Crusade
description: You issue a divine mandate or proclaim a cause to the targets.

name: Curse of Calamity
description: You condemn your targets to violent misfortune.

name: Detonate Magic
description: You cause the magic within the target to dissipate in a destructive explosion.

name: Dimensional Excision
source: Pathfinder #212: A Voice in the Blight
description: You manipulate the boundaries between planes like a scalpel, using it to cut away portions of a creature's essence and banishing those portions to other realities and dimensions, afflicting the target deep lacerations or even severed appendages.

name: Disjunction
description: Crackling energy disjoins the target.

name: Divinity Leech
source: Pathfinder #162: Ruins of the Radiant Siege
description: You disrupt the connection between a divine caster or deific servitor and their deity, blocking their use of divine power.

name: Embrace Nothingness
description: You empty your body of substance, becoming one with nothingness.

name: Falling Stars
description: Area 4 40-foot bursts You reach into the skies and call down an array of falling stars that explode upon colliding with the ground.

name: Fantastic Facade
description: Area up to 1 mile radius circle centered on you.You draw a permanent series of complex illusions over the target settlement, choosing the look, sound, feel, and smell of the structures, terrain, and creatures within at the time the ritual is cast.

name: Foresight
description: You gain a sixth sense that warns you of danger that might befall the target of the spell.

name: Implosion
description: You crush the target by causing it to collapse in on itself, dealing 75 damage.

name: Linnorm Sting
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven
description: You replicate the fiery venom of the tor linnorm and inflict an enemy with the dread dragon's debilitating bite.

name: Magnetic Dominion
description: The roiling magnetic fields of the Plane of Metal radiate from you as you channel and reshape them at your merest thought.

name: Massacre
description: You unleash a wave of death to snuff out the life force of those in its path.

name: Metamorphosis
description: Harnessing your mastery of transformative magic, you hide forms within forms.

name: Nature's Enmity
description: Animals, plants, and fungi in the area turn against the targets.

name: Ocean's Roar
description: You invoke consciousness in a large body of water, such as a coastline, lake, or lagoon.

name: One with the Land
description: You merge with an adjacent natural feature with enough volume to fit you and your worn and held possessions, such as the ground or a large tree.

name: Overwhelming Presence
description: You surround yourself with supernatural splendor, appearing to be a god or similarly majestic being, with an appearance, regalia, and iconography of your choice.

name: Phantasmagoria
description: You fill the targets' minds with endless images, like countless dreams and lives colliding with each other.

name: Power Word Kill
description: You utter the most powerful arcane word of power.

name: Prismatic Shield
source: Pathfinder #162: Ruins of the Radiant Siege
description: Shield-sized shards of multicolored light manifest in the air around you, each rotating quickly to intercept attacks.

name: Prismatic Sphere
description: You create a seven-layered sphere to protect an area.

name: Proliferating Eyes
description: You implant an , magical eye sensor on the target's body.

name: Purify Tanglebriar
source: Pathfinder #212: A Voice in the Blight
description: You call upon the primal presence of the Fierani Forest and the elven legacy of Kyonin in an attempt to purify a portion of the blighted realm of Tanglebriar.

name: Qi Form
description: Drawing from deep wells of spiritual power, you take on a special qi form.

name: Resplendent Mansion
description: You conjure a towering mansion up to four stories tall and up to 300 feet on a side.

name: Seize Soul
description: You trap the target's soul in the item before the soul can pass on to the afterlife.

name: Storm Lord
description: The sky above you darkens in a matter of moments, swirling with ominous clouds punctuated by flashes of lighting.

name: Storm of Vengeance
description: A massive storm cloud forms in the air in a 360-foot burst.

name: Summon Ancient Fleshforged
description: You summon an ancient Fleshforged, one of Nex's personal weaponized monstrosities unleashed in the first wars against Geb.

name: Summon Draconic Legion
description: You momentarily summon an army of powerful dragons that unleash annihilating blasts as they descend upon your location.

name: Telepathic Demand
description: You send the target a message of 25 words or fewer, and it can respond immediately with its own message of 25 words or fewer.

name: Trim the Blight
source: Pathfinder #212: A Voice in the Blight
description: You create a cone of shimmering energy that attempts to banish the influence of invasive, supernatural blight, such as that found in Tanglebriar.

name: Unblinking Flame Ignition
description: Trigger A foe reduces you to half your Hit Points or fewer.

name: Unbreaking Wave Containment
description: You wrap enemies in four strands of water.

name: Undertaker
description: You point your finger toward the target and whisper an epitaph that promises to grace their gravestone in the near future.

name: Unfathomable Song
description: Fleeting notes of a strange and unnatural song fill the air, overtaking the mind.

name: Unfolding Wind Crash
description: You jump up to 120 feet in any direction and then deal 18d6 bludgeoning damage to creatures within a 20‐foot emanation after you land, with a basic Reflex save.

name: Unspeakable Shadow
description: You alter a creature's shadow, transforming it into a terrifying monster out to devour the creature.

name: Untwisting Iron Pillar
description: You call upon the earth and your ki to shield you from your enemies.

name: Upheaval
description: The ground in the area shudders and crumbles as huge pillars of stone erupt into the air, rending the terrain around them.

name: Vital Singularity
description: When several companions or followers have reached a point of undying love and trust in you, they might be willing to die to save your life.

name: Void Harvest
description: The sky darkens over the affected area and the air becomes oppressive as you open a direct conduit to the Void, a plane of vast nothingness.

name: Voracious Gestalt
description: You create a powerful spirit entity that grows and builds strength by consuming the spirits of foes you both slay.

name: Wails of the Damned
description: You howl a lament of damned souls.

name: Weapon of Judgment
description: An immense weapon of spiritual energy appears, hovering in the air above the target.

name: Weird
description: You fill the targets' minds with terrifying images of fearsome creatures, each drawn from the targets' worst fears.

name: Wrathful Storm
description: A massive storm cloud forms in the air above the area, spreading rain and gales.

name: Alter Reality
description: You use your occult lore and the power of your mind to manipulate the spiritual multiverse, resulting in any of the following effects: Duplicate any occult spell of 9th rank or lower to which you have access.

name: Anima Invocation (Modified)
description: When casting the modified version of the Anima Invocation, it instead draws upon the latent spiritual energies of sapient creatures within range of the spell without requiring their deaths, then uses this energy to bolster the connection between body and soul among all of the ritual's casters.

name: Apex Companion
description: You focus on the energies of all members of your animal companion's species, transforming your animal companion into its apex battle form.

name: Avatar
description: You transform into an avatar of your deity, assuming a Huge battle form.

name: Cataclysm
description: You call upon the unimaginable power of world-ending cataclysms, ripping a small piece of each cataclysm and combining them together into one horrifically powerful attack.

name: Destroy Mindscape
description: After you gather the anchors that make up the mindscape's structure, or in the case of anchors too immense to move, when you gain control over the region surrounding the anchors, you can perform this ritual to tear the mindscape apart from within.

name: Dinosaur Fort
description: You conjure a primeval fort with walls of sharpened wood adorned with dinosaur skin and teeth, up to 300 feet on a side.

name: Element Embodied
description: Drawing upon the deepest wells of magic in an elemental plane, you transform into a spectacular elemental.

name: Fabricated Truth
description: Choose a single statement you want the targets to believe.

name: Fatal Aria
description: You perform music so perfect that the target may die of joy or sorrow.

name: Fated Confrontation
description: You weave the threads of fate to lead two foes into a climactic battle.

name: Freeze Time
description: You temporarily stop time for everything but yourself, allowing you to use several actions in what appears to others to be no time at all.

name: Garden of the Green Man's Growth
description: You cast your magic into the earth, calling out to a powerful green man, a verdant lesser deity of nature, to come to your aid.

name: Gate
description: You tear open a rift to another plane, creating a portal that creatures can travel through in either direction.

name: Hero's Defiance
description: Trigger An attack would bring you to 0 Hit Points.You shout in defiance and are filled with a burst of healing.

name: Indestructibility
description: You sever yourself from cause and effect.

name: Manifestation
description: You spin secrets from the fundaments of magic, shaping them into a power with nearly unlimited potential.

name: Miracle
description: You request aid directly from your divine source.

name: Nature Incarnate
description: The primal power of the world flows through you.

name: Nullify
description: Trigger A foe within range casts a 9th-rank or lower spell.

name: Perfection of Essence
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia World Guide
description: Many have pursued alchemical means to immortality, and most haven't survived the attempt.

name: Pied Piping
description: Your performance enraptures listeners, compelling them to follow you.

name: Primal Herd
description: Summoning the power of the natural world, you transform the targets into a herd of mammoths, and they each assume a Huge battle form.

name: Primal Phenomenon
description: You request a direct intercession from the natural world.

name: Raga of Remembrance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth
description: You scribe occult symbols on unblighted Vudran ground, laying the ceramics within them to create a ritual space.

name: Remake
description: You fully re-create an object from nothing, even if the object was destroyed.

name: Revival
description: A burst of healing energy soothes living creatures and temporarily rouses those recently slain.

name: Shadow Army
description: You create dozens of semi-real copies of yourself that swarm across the battlefield and fight your enemies.

name: Song of the Fallen
description: You chant a dirge or an elegy that either rouses the dead to action or reminds undead that they should lay to rest.

name: Summon Kaiju
description: You briefly conjure a kaiju, a massive, rampaging monster with a unique name and legendary reputation.

name: Summon Oliphaunt of Jandelay
description: You briefly summon the mythical Oliphaunt of Jandelay, unleashing a manifestation of pure destruction that obliterates everything unfortunate enough to stand in its path.

name: Wild Allegiance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia World Guide
description: To many, the animals of Tian Xia are simply beasts to be conquered or harvested, but this isn't how all of the gods intended it.

name: Wish
description: You weave the fabric of reality itself to grant the target's greatest desire.
